programme.title: Tenable
programme.desc: The Gandhi family answer top 10 questions on subjects including EastEnders, The Jungle Book and Formula One, as they try to score the Perfect 10. Quiz hosted by Warwick Davis

programme.title: The Bidding Room
programme.desc: Naomi, Trevor and Tallulah bring in a bamboo egg chair from the 1970s that catches the eye of the mid-century traders. Lisa brings in two vibrant pieces of fashion history, some bright and bold 1970s vintage dresses. Jayne brings in a large Father Christmas figurine to bring some festive joy to the bidding room and Jamie brings in a retro SodaStream. Last in is Shaun with a 1970s electronic science kit for dealers JB, Ian, Lauren, Estelle Lucy, Melissa, Moses and Adi to bid for

programme.title: Prey (2022)
programme.desc: In 1719 on the Northern Great Plains, Comanche tracker Naru undertakes a rite of passage to slay a ferocious predator. During a fierce tussle with a mountain lion, Naru glimpses strange lights in the treeline: a warning that a highly evolved, otherworldly creature with cloaking technology and explosive armaments is at large on the plains. Sci-fi thriller, starring Amber Midthunder and Dakota Beavers. Directed by Dan Trachtenberg, who also helmed recent franchise offerings Predator: Killer of Killers, and Predator: Badlands

programme.title: Bill Bailey: Larks in Transit
programme.desc: A stand-up performance by the 2020 Strictly champion in which he became the first British comedian to tread the boards of the Royal Opera House in Covent Garden, sharing tales from more than 20 years as a travelling performer. Topics include Google reviews of Poundland stores, a unique proposal for a Victorian-style Love Island and Old MacDonald sung in the style of Tom Waits. With a guest appearance by soprano Florence Hvorostovsky

programme.title: Crawlspace (2022)
programme.desc: After witnessing a brutal murder from beneath the floorboards of a rural cabin, a plumber finds himself trapped in the crawl space of the property in which the murderers think a load of cash is stashed. Thriller, starring Henry Thomas, Bradley Stryker and C Ernst Harth

programme.title: Ramsays Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay checks in to the River Rock Inn in Milford, Pennsylvania, where owner Ken Pisciotta is struggling to attract guests and battling huge debts. He has all but given up and his constant negativity is rubbing off on the staff. Can Gordon get this establishment back on track before Ken loses everything?

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition heads to the Old Times Guesthouse in Ipswich, where mother-and-daughter duo Linda and Kelly Langdown hope a go-karting session will get the contest off to a flying start. However, a lack of breakfast options and corner-cutting on the guests orders do not go down very well

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The guests visit the Flower Pot in Sunbury-on-Thames on their second night, where owner Simon Bailey and French manager Pierre Cudon provide stylish continental-inspired accommodation, but the hosts are left puzzled by some of the feedback they receive the next morning

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit is to the family run Dolphin Hotel in Exmouth, Devon, which has been a lifes work for hotelier Jo Knowles. On arrival, Pat and Nigel find a suspicious stain, before the guests put on their war faces for a game of paintball. Jo takes everyone to a floating restaurant for dinner, and the next morning she presents a huge spread for breakfast - but her diners are suspicious that it has been laid on specially for the competition

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants stay at the Mariners Beachside BandB in Seaton, Devon, but are disappointed by the cleanliness of the property. They take part in a town-crying competition during the afternoon, and host Nigel feels under pressure to deliver his award-winning breakfast the next morning. Come feedback time, the owners discover not all their guests share the same opinion

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandB owners meet for the final time to find out what they have been paid, and confront their rivals. Simon Bailey and Pierre Cudon from the Flower Pot feel the feedback left by Nigel and Pat Booth is a step too far, while the Mariners BandB owners hit back at the mens opinion of their establishments cleanliness. Linda and Kelly Langdown of the Old Times Guest House question the rating of their facilities, while the Dolphin Hotels Jo Knowles has a confession to make regarding her hosting

programme.title: Kirsties House of Craft
programme.desc: Celebrities Chris Hollins and Laura Hamilton have just 30 minutes to complete their makes and impress Kirstie and experts Polly and Piyush. Here, the duo try crafting colourful paper gift bags

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Spence introduces Doug to his new girlfriend, a professional chef - and Carrie is less than pleased when her husband becomes devoted to the culinary delights she produces. Kevin James stars, with Leah Remini and Christen Nelson

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Carrie and Doug plan a weekend visit to Atlantic City to celebrate the anniversary of their first date - but they are not the only ones making the trip. Before they know it, Dougs boss is along for the ride. Comedy, starring Kevin James

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Dozy Doug cheers up Deacon by taking him clubbing, and Carrie begins to feel threatened by a lookalike colleague. Comedy, starring Kevin James and Leah Remini

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Frank puts salt on Maries home-made lasagne, causing her to think she is turning into a terrible cook, but Ray and Robert discover their father has lost his sense of taste - apparently because of a potency medication he is taking. Comedy, starring Peter Boyle, Doris Roberts, Ray Romano and Brad Garrett

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Amy chats non-stop through a basketball game, and Ray responds by suggesting to Robert that she talks too much - a criticism she does not take well. Comedy, starring Monica Horan and Ray Romano

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The family heads to New York after Bart hears his ex-girlfriend Mary Spuckler (Zooey Deschanel) is living there. But once he arrives, the spiky-haired youngster revisits a few more of his old flames - voiced by Anne Hathaway, Sarah Michelle Gellar, Natalie Portman and Sarah Silverman - while Lisa and Marge take in the local culture

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Grampa evades the security of the retirement home, and Homer and Marge set out to find him. Along the way, they discover intriguing details of his past, such as the time he worked alongside musician Marvin Hamlisch. The Oscar-winning composer guest stars as himself, in a role he recorded shortly before his death

programme.title: Paw Patrol: The Movie (2021)
programme.desc: When the crews biggest rival, Mayor Humdinger, becomes Mayor of nearby Adventure City and starts wreaking havoc, Ryder and the heroic pups kick into high gear to face the challenge head-on. While one of the pups must face his past in Adventure City, the team finds help from a new ally, the savvy dachshund Liberty. Animated adventure, starring Tyler Perry

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off at Manor House Inn in Haltwhistle, Northumberland, run by Terry and Rachel. Guests Tony and Paula are immediately enamoured of their room, revelling in the romance of the honeymoon suite. Over drinks, the BandBers size up the competition as they compare their hospitality experience, with one revealing that theyre a veteran of the industry. After a sound sleep for some, Dean wakes up with a headache thanks to a banging headboard, and things dont get any better for him at breakfast

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandBers visit Tom and Beckys Orchard Glamping in Lancashire hoping to prove their pristine pods are pitch perfect. Things are off to a good start but breakfast divides opinions

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week is to Hotel Ellenby in Scarborough with hosts Tony and Paula who humbly reveal themselves as King and Queen of the towns hospitality scene, but their crowns slip at breakfast when the guests are not amused

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The weeks final visit is to The Crown Inn in Derbyshire, where father-and-daughter team Dean and Abigail take great pride in their pub. The trip hits the skids when Terry and Rachel give their room a dusting down and Becky and Tom arent taken in by the view

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants meet one last time to discover how much they have been paid by their fellow hoteliers and to air their grievances. Theres a smorgasbord of slanderous sleep scores, brutal breakfast bombshells and even one couple declining the opportunity to face their competitors. Eventually, it is revealed who has won the competition

programme.title: The Boat Race
programme.desc: Clare Balding, Jamie Laing and Ade Adepitan present live coverage of the annual womens and mens rowing races between Oxford and Cambridge Universities on the River Thames. Cambridges recent dominance of the event continued last year, with them winning their sixth mens race out of the last seven and also claiming their eighth consecutive womens victory

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.sub-title: South East London and Devon Revisit
programme.desc: Catching up with two sets of house-hunters with different requirements. In 2010, Carole and Alan, and their daughter Lauren, were casting a wide net over Somerset and Devon. They needed a rural spot to accommodate Laurens dog training business, as well as a home with the potential to do holiday lets to keep Carole and Alan busy. And in 2019, Ros and Hannah wanted to buy their first home together, but finding somewhere that ticked all of their boxes proved. Now they programme returns to see how both couples are getting on

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer tackle one of their biggest challenges to date, in the Tyneside seaside town of Whitley Bay. Sarah and Sean share a sprawling six-bedroom, three-storey Victorian semi-detached home with their five children. It may have plenty of sleeping space but the kitchens cramped, the gardens like a postage-stamp, and all seven of them share one bathroom. Sarah, whos deeply attached to their beachside lifestyle and her home-run re-usable cloth nappy business, insists that they stay, in the firm belief that knocking down walls will solve everything. But Seans done with the galley kitchen, lack of outside space, and constant chaos of seven people sharing one toilet! He dreads uncovering problems from a house that constantly fights back during renovations. Of course, Kirstie loves knocking down walls, and she has a £70,000 budget to modernise inside while also preserving the Victorian charm. But emergency maintenance soon stretches her funds to the limit. Meanwhile, Phil scours the market with his £650,000 budget, finding some stunning homes that tempt Sean. But Sarah digs in, which puts the final decision on a knifes edge. Will the family love their seaside semi, or list it?

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Britains Most Luxurious Train Journeys
programme.desc: The historic Settle to Carlisle line, travelling through some of Lancashire, Yorkshire and Cumbrias most stunning countryside and passing over the iconic Ribblehead Viaduct. The trains staff help out with a surprise wedding proposal and a 90th birthday celebration, while executive chef Nick creates masterpiece meals including a shin of Galloway beef and a trio of mini desserts

programme.title: Yorkshire by the Sea
programme.desc: Documentary following the lives of locals living along Yorkshires coastline. This episode features members of the Robson family from Bridlington, whove been fishing the North Sea for generations, as they head up the coast to Whitby for a boat repair. Volunteers at Bempton Cliffs work to protect and preserve almost half a million seabirds, and a group of sea swimmers take a full-moon sea swim at Scarborough

programme.title: Bill Baileys Vietnam
programme.desc: Bill uncovers the importance of ancient stories in Vietnamese culture. Setting sail on a traditional junk boat, he weaves through the breathtakingly beautiful limestone karsts and mythical waters of Ha Long Bay, where legends of dragons live on. From floating villages to freshly caught mussels, and flesh-eating fish, Bill finds himself at the end of his adventure

programme.title: Bill Bailey: Thoughtifier
programme.desc: The comedian goes on a magical, musical mystery tour of the human mind in his 2025 stand-up show recorded live at the Edinburgh Playhouse. He muses on Elon Musk, polar bear raves, the hilarious spectre of AI-generated sea shanties and predictions of the collapse of the teaspoon industry, all amplified with brilliant music on ever-more ambitious instruments, including the laser harp

programme.title: Nightmare Alley (2021)
programme.desc: An ambitious carnival worker with a talent for manipulating people joins forces with a female psychiatrist who is even more dangerous than he is. Guillermo del Toros thriller, starring Bradley Cooper, Cate Blanchett and Toni Collette

programme.title: Ramsays Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Supercar fanatic Eddie Kaen has spent millions on the design of the Keating in San Diego, California, but neglected to invest in things the guests really need. Gordon Ramsays visit uncovers empty rooms, a failing restaurant and staff at the end of their tether - leading to a shocking crisis that nobody saw coming

programme.title: George Clarkes Old House, New Home
programme.desc: George visits Manchester to bring an arts and crafts-inspired Edwardian home into the modern day. In London, he meets Flo, a first-time buyer whose flat needs a rejig to make it the sociable space she has always wanted

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The family heads to New York after Bart hears his ex-girlfriend Mary Spuckler (Zooey Deschanel) is living there. But once he arrives, the spiky-haired youngster revisits a few more of his old flames - voiced by Anne Hathaway, Sarah Michelle Gellar, Natalie Portman and Sarah Silverman - while Lisa and Marge take in the local culture

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Grampa evades the security of the retirement home, and Homer and Marge set out to find him. Along the way, they discover intriguing details of his past, such as the time he worked alongside musician Marvin Hamlisch. The Oscar-winning composer guest stars as himself, in a role he recorded shortly before his death

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug and Carrie take a disastrous journey to New Orleans, while Arthur tries to create a comic strip for Playboy, only to find his artistic talents leave something to be desired. Comedy, starring Kevin James

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Carrie and Doug yearn to play a golf foursome at the country club, and set about finding a date for Deacon to complete the group - even though it seems hes perfectly capable of managing his own love life. Starring Kevin James and Leah Remini

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Dougs uncle offers to finance his dream of owning his own sandwich shop. However, the scheme meets with disapproval from Carrie, who knows her husband isnt cut out for running a company, and from Danny, whose own request for help in starting a business was rejected

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra cannot understand why Ray keeps turning down her advances - not realising that playing it cool is all part of his latest devious plan to get what he wants. Comedy, starring Ray Romano

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Pat asks Robert to keep her cigarette habit a secret - but he later has to come up with an excuse when Amy smells smoke on him, leading to a string of revelations for the family

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: In the last-ever episode of the American comedy, Ray has a brush with death while undergoing minor surgery, but pulls through - leaving his family uncertain over whether to tell him what happened

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The new man in Rozs life befriends Frasier - who tries to keep the situation from her in case she starts to feel betrayed. Comedy, guest starring Gary Cole (Entourage), with Kelsey Grammer, David Hyde Pierce and Peri Gilpin

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Bubbly co-host Dr Mary joins Frasier to present a Christmas parade, but he is forced to take drastic action when she steals his limelight. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The Seattle shrink finds out he is going to receive a lifetime achievement award, but a letter of congratulations from his mentor plunges him into an emotional crisis. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Sunday Brunch
programme.desc: Tim Lovejoy and Simon Rimmer are joined by guests Tasha Ghouri, Vicky Pattison, Ellie Kildunne, Frances Barber and Kellie Shirley. With music from Arlo Parks

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is surprised to learn that his accountant neighbour Dan works for Fat Tony - and has been asked to take the Mob bosss place while he serves time on a jury. Meanwhile, Lisa decides to add insects to her diet, but is plagued by a series of nightmares. With the voice of Steve Carell

programme.title: Mr Poppers Penguins (2011)
programme.desc: A workaholic businessman always puts his job before his family until he receives an unexpected inheritance from his explorer father - six penguins. He abandons his plan to offload the birds to a zoo when he finds his kids love them, and sets about turning his New York apartment into a suitable habitat. Family comedy, starring Jim Carrey, Carla Gugino and Angela Lansbury

programme.title: Luca (2021)
programme.desc: Two sea monsters fascinated with life above water disguise themselves as human boys so they can explore a town on the Italian Riviera. The duo strike up a friendship with a local girl, and risk their secret being exposed as they help her to compete in an annual sporting event. Pixar animated adventure, with the voices of Jacob Tremblay and Jack Dylan Grazer

programme.title: Toy Story 3 (2010)
programme.desc: Woody, Buzz and the other toys accidentally end up in a daycare centre when their owner grows up. At first this seems like the perfect new home for them, but when they realise the dangers lurking under the surface, they begin to formulate an escape plan. Pixar animated adventure sequel, with the voices of Tom Hanks, Tim Allen, Joan Cusack, Michael Keaton and Ned Beatty

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up to Cancer
programme.desc: Hosts Noel Fielding and Alison Hammond and judges Cherish Finden and Paul Hollywood are joined in the tent by Alex Brooker, Ambika Mod, Rose Ayling-Ellis, Vicky Pattison and Sam Thompson. The celebrity bakers must make mini rolls and syrup sponge puddings, and recreate the most iconic outfits theyve ever worn in choux form

programme.title: Sarah Millican: Late Bloomer
programme.desc: The comedians seventh stand-up special, recorded during a performance at the Hexagon in Reading. Sarah reflects on how the timid child she used to be developed into the proudly outspoken woman she has become

programme.title: The Hunt: Prey vs Predator
programme.desc: The sixth hunt gets underway, and a first-time Predators ruthless pursuit is soon rewarded, even if its not the capture some were hoping for. Alliances chop and change, and the Predators join forces to hunt one unlucky player, who assumes their fate is sealed. But back at basecamp, a last-minute plot turns the game on its head

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: The armchair critics share their opinions on Race Across the World, Married at First Sight Australia, The Apprentice, Last One Laughing, Secrets of the Bees, Just One Thing and Celebrity Ex on the Beach

programme.title: Speed (1994)
programme.desc: An LAPD cop discovers a psychotic criminal has planted a bomb on a crowded bus, primed to go off if the vehicle drops below 50mph. He boards the vehicle and helps a hapless passenger who has been forced to take the wheel and keep a constant speed to avoid a disaster. Action thriller, starring Keanu Reeves, Sandra Bullock, Dennis Hopper and Jeff Daniels

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef heads to Italian family restaurant Sabatiellos in Stamford, Connecticut, where the owners fiery temper upsets the staff and has left him more than $1million in debt. Gordons help is urgently needed to get customers back through the door, but the restaurateur does not take kindly to criticism and closes the restaurant down when his employees turn on him

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer must save his marriage after a disastrous lunch date at Swankyfish, and tries to prove to Marge just how much she means to him by helping around the house. Meanwhile, Milhouse acts like a bad boy to impress Lisa. Featuring the guest voices of Breaking Bads Bryan Cranston and Aaron Paul

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is down in the dumps, until Lisa wins him a hi-tech computer tablet in the school raffle - and it soon becomes impossible for him to put it down, as every waking minute he finds himself stroking or jabbing the shiny touchscreen. However, disaster strikes when he breaks the device, sending him spiralling back down into the depths of despair. But when Ned Flanders discovers the word Hope written on a tree trunk in the Simpsons garden, Homer believes it to be a miracle and his faith in life is restored - although newsman Kent Brockman isnt quite so convinced

programme.title: Sunday Brunch
programme.desc: Tim Lovejoy and Simon Rimmer chat to astronaut Tim Peake, in a highlight from Sunday Brunch

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples from Birmingham compete to win the £1,000 prize, including Helen and her husband Lorne, who aim to channel their 24 years together into a safe, solid menu. However, lovebirds Ciaran and Anita criticise the food for lacking passion, and try to spice things up. Meanwhile, Rob is so entranced by his Lithuanian wife Egle that he regularly feels the need to pinch himself whenever he looks at her

programme.title: George Clarkes Old House, New Home
programme.desc: The architect advises more people make their period homes fit for modern life. In Clapham, south London, Masum and Marias Victorian terraced home is no longer working for the three generations of family living there. George also travels to Hove to meet Louis and Sarah, who are tackling the upstairs of their 16th-century gatehouse

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the words-and-numbers game, with Mike Bubbins joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Part two of two. A glamorous TV executive makes Sam an offer he cannot refuse, but Diane points out there are certain strings attached

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: As Sam and Diane finally get together, their bar-room pals grow increasingly pessimistic about the relationship. Comedy, starring Ted Danson

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Cliff falls head over heels for Carlas not-so-innocent little sister, and it is up to the gang to tell him the truth about her. American bar-room comedy, starring Ted Danson

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra tires of having to deal with Rays interfering mother, grumpy father and resentful brother, who constantly show up out of the blue, and a white lie has embarrassing consequences. Pilot episode of the comedy, starring Ray Romano and Patricia Heaton

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra sees newlywed friends making a public display of affection, and cannot help wondering why Raymond has so much trouble telling her he loves her. Ray Romano stars

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray gives the eulogy at a family funeral, but his Aunt Alda spoils the solemnity of the event by rekindling a seven-year-old feud with his mother. American comedy, starring Ray Romano and Jean Stapleton

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The Seattle shrink takes his teenage son Frederick on a camping trip with Martin in a bid to rebuild their relationship. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and John Mahoney

programme.title: Nightmare Alley (2021)
programme.desc: An ambitious carnival worker with a talent for manipulating people joins forces with a female psychiatrist who is even more dangerous than he is. Guillermo del Toros thriller, starring Bradley Cooper, Cate Blanchett and Toni Collette

programme.title: Crawlspace (2022)
programme.desc: After witnessing a brutal murder from beneath the floorboards of a rural cabin, a plumber finds himself trapped in the crawl space of the property in which the murderers think a load of cash is stashed. Thriller, starring Henry Thomas, Bradley Stryker and C Ernst Harth

programme.title: Ramsays Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay checks in to the River Rock Inn in Milford, Pennsylvania, where owner Ken Pisciotta is struggling to attract guests and battling huge debts. He has all but given up and his constant negativity is rubbing off on the staff. Can Gordon get this establishment back on track before Ken loses everything?

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition heads to the Old Times Guesthouse in Ipswich, where mother-and-daughter duo Linda and Kelly Langdown hope a go-karting session will get the contest off to a flying start. However, a lack of breakfast options and corner-cutting on the guests orders do not go down very well

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The guests visit the Flower Pot in Sunbury-on-Thames on their second night, where owner Simon Bailey and French manager Pierre Cudon provide stylish continental-inspired accommodation, but the hosts are left puzzled by some of the feedback they receive the next morning

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit is to the family run Dolphin Hotel in Exmouth, Devon, which has been a lifes work for hotelier Jo Knowles. On arrival, Pat and Nigel find a suspicious stain, before the guests put on their war faces for a game of paintball. Jo takes everyone to a floating restaurant for dinner, and the next morning she presents a huge spread for breakfast - but her diners are suspicious that it has been laid on specially for the competition

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants stay at the Mariners Beachside BandB in Seaton, Devon, but are disappointed by the cleanliness of the property. They take part in a town-crying competition during the afternoon, and host Nigel feels under pressure to deliver his award-winning breakfast the next morning. Come feedback time, the owners discover not all their guests share the same opinion

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandB owners meet for the final time to find out what they have been paid, and confront their rivals. Simon Bailey and Pierre Cudon from the Flower Pot feel the feedback left by Nigel and Pat Booth is a step too far, while the Mariners BandB owners hit back at the mens opinion of their establishments cleanliness. Linda and Kelly Langdown of the Old Times Guest House question the rating of their facilities, while the Dolphin Hotels Jo Knowles has a confession to make regarding her hosting

programme.title: Kirsties House of Craft
programme.desc: Celebrities Chris Hollins and Laura Hamilton have just 30 minutes to complete their makes and impress Kirstie and experts Polly and Piyush. Here, the duo try crafting colourful paper gift bags

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Spence introduces Doug to his new girlfriend, a professional chef - and Carrie is less than pleased when her husband becomes devoted to the culinary delights she produces. Kevin James stars, with Leah Remini and Christen Nelson

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Carrie and Doug plan a weekend visit to Atlantic City to celebrate the anniversary of their first date - but they are not the only ones making the trip. Before they know it, Dougs boss is along for the ride. Comedy, starring Kevin James

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Dozy Doug cheers up Deacon by taking him clubbing, and Carrie begins to feel threatened by a lookalike colleague. Comedy, starring Kevin James and Leah Remini

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Frank puts salt on Maries home-made lasagne, causing her to think she is turning into a terrible cook, but Ray and Robert discover their father has lost his sense of taste - apparently because of a potency medication he is taking. Comedy, starring Peter Boyle, Doris Roberts, Ray Romano and Brad Garrett

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Amy chats non-stop through a basketball game, and Ray responds by suggesting to Robert that she talks too much - a criticism she does not take well. Comedy, starring Monica Horan and Ray Romano

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The family heads to New York after Bart hears his ex-girlfriend Mary Spuckler (Zooey Deschanel) is living there. But once he arrives, the spiky-haired youngster revisits a few more of his old flames - voiced by Anne Hathaway, Sarah Michelle Gellar, Natalie Portman and Sarah Silverman - while Lisa and Marge take in the local culture

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Grampa evades the security of the retirement home, and Homer and Marge set out to find him. Along the way, they discover intriguing details of his past, such as the time he worked alongside musician Marvin Hamlisch. The Oscar-winning composer guest stars as himself, in a role he recorded shortly before his death

programme.title: Paw Patrol: The Movie (2021)
programme.desc: When the crews biggest rival, Mayor Humdinger, becomes Mayor of nearby Adventure City and starts wreaking havoc, Ryder and the heroic pups kick into high gear to face the challenge head-on. While one of the pups must face his past in Adventure City, the team finds help from a new ally, the savvy dachshund Liberty. Animated adventure, starring Tyler Perry

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off at Manor House Inn in Haltwhistle, Northumberland, run by Terry and Rachel. Guests Tony and Paula are immediately enamoured of their room, revelling in the romance of the honeymoon suite. Over drinks, the BandBers size up the competition as they compare their hospitality experience, with one revealing that theyre a veteran of the industry. After a sound sleep for some, Dean wakes up with a headache thanks to a banging headboard, and things dont get any better for him at breakfast

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandBers visit Tom and Beckys Orchard Glamping in Lancashire hoping to prove their pristine pods are pitch perfect. Things are off to a good start but breakfast divides opinions

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third visit of the week is to Hotel Ellenby in Scarborough with hosts Tony and Paula who humbly reveal themselves as King and Queen of the towns hospitality scene, but their crowns slip at breakfast when the guests are not amused

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The weeks final visit is to The Crown Inn in Derbyshire, where father-and-daughter team Dean and Abigail take great pride in their pub. The trip hits the skids when Terry and Rachel give their room a dusting down and Becky and Tom arent taken in by the view

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The contestants meet one last time to discover how much they have been paid by their fellow hoteliers and to air their grievances. Theres a smorgasbord of slanderous sleep scores, brutal breakfast bombshells and even one couple declining the opportunity to face their competitors. Eventually, it is revealed who has won the competition

programme.title: The Boat Race
programme.desc: Clare Balding, Jamie Laing and Ade Adepitan present live coverage of the annual womens and mens rowing races between Oxford and Cambridge Universities on the River Thames. Cambridges recent dominance of the event continued last year, with them winning their sixth mens race out of the last seven and also claiming their eighth consecutive womens victory

programme.title: Location, Location, Location
programme.sub-title: South East London and Devon Revisit
programme.desc: Catching up with two sets of house-hunters with different requirements. In 2010, Carole and Alan, and their daughter Lauren, were casting a wide net over Somerset and Devon. They needed a rural spot to accommodate Laurens dog training business, as well as a home with the potential to do holiday lets to keep Carole and Alan busy. And in 2019, Ros and Hannah wanted to buy their first home together, but finding somewhere that ticked all of their boxes proved. Now they programme returns to see how both couples are getting on

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer tackle one of their biggest challenges to date, in the Tyneside seaside town of Whitley Bay. Sarah and Sean share a sprawling six-bedroom, three-storey Victorian semi-detached home with their five children. It may have plenty of sleeping space but the kitchens cramped, the gardens like a postage-stamp, and all seven of them share one bathroom. Sarah, whos deeply attached to their beachside lifestyle and her home-run re-usable cloth nappy business, insists that they stay, in the firm belief that knocking down walls will solve everything. But Seans done with the galley kitchen, lack of outside space, and constant chaos of seven people sharing one toilet! He dreads uncovering problems from a house that constantly fights back during renovations. Of course, Kirstie loves knocking down walls, and she has a £70,000 budget to modernise inside while also preserving the Victorian charm. But emergency maintenance soon stretches her funds to the limit. Meanwhile, Phil scours the market with his £650,000 budget, finding some stunning homes that tempt Sean. But Sarah digs in, which puts the final decision on a knifes edge. Will the family love their seaside semi, or list it?

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.title: Britains Most Luxurious Train Journeys
programme.desc: The historic Settle to Carlisle line, travelling through some of Lancashire, Yorkshire and Cumbrias most stunning countryside and passing over the iconic Ribblehead Viaduct. The trains staff help out with a surprise wedding proposal and a 90th birthday celebration, while executive chef Nick creates masterpiece meals including a shin of Galloway beef and a trio of mini desserts

programme.title: Yorkshire by the Sea
programme.desc: Documentary following the lives of locals living along Yorkshires coastline. This episode features members of the Robson family from Bridlington, whove been fishing the North Sea for generations, as they head up the coast to Whitby for a boat repair. Volunteers at Bempton Cliffs work to protect and preserve almost half a million seabirds, and a group of sea swimmers take a full-moon sea swim at Scarborough

programme.title: Bill Baileys Vietnam
programme.desc: Bill uncovers the importance of ancient stories in Vietnamese culture. Setting sail on a traditional junk boat, he weaves through the breathtakingly beautiful limestone karsts and mythical waters of Ha Long Bay, where legends of dragons live on. From floating villages to freshly caught mussels, and flesh-eating fish, Bill finds himself at the end of his adventure

programme.title: Bill Bailey: Thoughtifier
programme.desc: The comedian goes on a magical, musical mystery tour of the human mind in his 2025 stand-up show recorded live at the Edinburgh Playhouse. He muses on Elon Musk, polar bear raves, the hilarious spectre of AI-generated sea shanties and predictions of the collapse of the teaspoon industry, all amplified with brilliant music on ever-more ambitious instruments, including the laser harp

programme.title: Prey (2022)
programme.desc: In 1719 on the Northern Great Plains, Comanche tracker Naru undertakes a rite of passage to slay a ferocious predator. During a fierce tussle with a mountain lion, Naru glimpses strange lights in the treeline: a warning that a highly evolved, otherworldly creature with cloaking technology and explosive armaments is at large on the plains. Sci-fi thriller, starring Amber Midthunder and Dakota Beavers. Directed by Dan Trachtenberg, who also helmed recent franchise offerings Predator: Killer of Killers, and Predator: Badlands

programme.title: Speed (1994)
programme.desc: An LAPD cop discovers a psychotic criminal has planted a bomb on a crowded bus, primed to go off if the vehicle drops below 50mph. He boards the vehicle and helps a hapless passenger who has been forced to take the wheel and keep a constant speed to avoid a disaster. Action thriller, starring Keanu Reeves, Sandra Bullock, Dennis Hopper and Jeff Daniels

programme.title: Ramsays Hotel Hell
programme.desc: Supercar fanatic Eddie Kaen has spent millions on the design of the Keating in San Diego, California, but neglected to invest in things the guests really need. Gordon Ramsays visit uncovers empty rooms, a failing restaurant and staff at the end of their tether - leading to a shocking crisis that nobody saw coming

programme.title: George Clarkes Old House, New Home
programme.desc: George visits Manchester to bring an arts and crafts-inspired Edwardian home into the modern day. In London, he meets Flo, a first-time buyer whose flat needs a rejig to make it the sociable space she has always wanted

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: The family heads to New York after Bart hears his ex-girlfriend Mary Spuckler (Zooey Deschanel) is living there. programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Grampa evades the security of the retirement home, and Homer and Marge set out to find him. Along the way, they discover intriguing details of his past, such as the time he worked alongside musician Marvin Hamlisch. The Oscar-winning composer guest stars as himself, in a role he recorded shortly before his death

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Doug and Carrie take a disastrous journey to New Orleans, while Arthur tries to create a comic strip for Playboy, only to find his artistic talents leave something to be desired. Comedy, starring Kevin James

programme.title: The King of Queens
programme.desc: Carrie and Doug yearn to play a golf foursome at the country club, and set about finding a date for Deacon to complete the group - even though it seems hes perfectly capable of managing his own love life. Starring Kevin James and Leah Remini

programme.desc: Dougs uncle offers to finance his dream of owning his own sandwich shop. However, the scheme meets with disapproval from Carrie, who knows her husband isnt cut out for running a company, and from Danny, whose own request for help in starting a business was rejected

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra cannot understand why Ray keeps turning down her advances - not realising that playing it cool is all part of his latest devious plan to get what he wants. Comedy, starring Ray Romano

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Pat asks Robert to keep her cigarette habit a secret - but he later has to come up with an excuse when Amy smells smoke on him, leading to a string of revelations for the family

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: In the last-ever episode of the American comedy, Ray has a brush with death while undergoing minor surgery, but pulls through - leaving his family uncertain over whether to tell him what happened

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The new man in Rozs life befriends Frasier - who tries to keep the situation from her in case she starts to feel betrayed. Comedy, guest starring Gary Cole (Entourage), with Kelsey Grammer, David Hyde Pierce and Peri Gilpin

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: Bubbly co-host Dr Mary joins Frasier to present a Christmas parade, but he is forced to take drastic action when she steals his limelight. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and David Hyde Pierce

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The Seattle shrink finds out he is going to receive a lifetime achievement award, but a letter of congratulations from his mentor plunges him into an emotional crisis. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: Sunday Brunch
programme.desc: Tim Lovejoy and Simon Rimmer are joined by guests Tasha Ghouri, Vicky Pattison, Ellie Kildunne, Frances Barber and Kellie Shirley. With music from Arlo Parks

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is surprised to learn that his accountant neighbour Dan works for Fat Tony - and has been asked to take the Mob bosss place while he serves time on a jury. Meanwhile, Lisa decides to add insects to her diet, but is plagued by a series of nightmares. With the voice of Steve Carell

programme.title: Mr Poppers Penguins (2011)
programme.desc: A workaholic businessman always puts his job before his family until he receives an unexpected inheritance from his explorer father - six penguins. He abandons his plan to offload the birds to a zoo when he finds his kids love them, and sets about turning his New York apartment into a suitable habitat. Family comedy, starring Jim Carrey, Carla Gugino and Angela Lansbury

programme.desc: Two sea monsters fascinated with life above water disguise themselves as human boys so they can explore a town on the Italian Riviera. The duo strike up a friendship with a local girl, and risk their secret being exposed as they help her to compete in an annual sporting event. Pixar animated adventure, with the voices of Jacob Tremblay and Jack Dylan Grazer

At first this seems like the perfect new home for them, but when they realise the dangers lurking under the surface, they begin to formulate an escape plan. Pixar animated adventure sequel, with the voices of Tom Hanks, Tim Allen, Joan Cusack, Michael Keaton and Ned Beatty

programme.title: Channel 4 News
programme.desc: Including sport and weather

programme.desc: Hosts Noel Fielding and Alison Hammond and judges Cherish Finden and Paul Hollywood are joined in the tent by Alex Brooker, Ambika Mod, Rose Ayling-Ellis, Vicky Pattison and Sam Thompson. The celebrity bakers must make mini rolls and syrup sponge puddings, and recreate the most iconic outfits theyve ever worn in choux form

programme.desc: Sothebys managing director Guy hopes to secure the listing of a £6.5million 14-bedroom, five-acre Grade II listed manor house mega home onto his books. Aston Tirrold in Oxfordshire boasts six reception rooms, a tennis court and a huge outdoor pool, and has been home to the same family since 1975. Broker Kenrick heads to Camden, north London, to try to secure the listing of an uber-modern glass building apartment with three bedrooms, three bathrooms and a 900-square-ft roof terrace

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef heads to Italian family restaurant Sabatiellos in Stamford, Connecticut, where the owners fiery temper upsets the staff and has left him more than $1million in debt. Gordons help is urgently needed to get customers back through the door, but the restaurateur does not take kindly to criticism and closes the restaurant down when his employees turn on him

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer must save his marriage after a disastrous lunch date at Swankyfish, and tries to prove to Marge just how much she means to him by helping around the house. Meanwhile, Milhouse acts like a bad boy to impress Lisa. Featuring the guest voices of Breaking Bads Bryan Cranston and Aaron Paul

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer is down in the dumps, until Lisa wins him a hi-tech computer tablet in the school raffle - and it soon becomes impossible for him to put it down, as every waking minute he finds himself stroking or jabbing the shiny touchscreen. However, disaster strikes when he breaks the device, sending him spiralling back down into the depths of despair. But when Ned Flanders discovers the word Hope written on a tree trunk in the Simpsons garden, Homer believes it to be a miracle and his faith in life is restored - although newsman Kent Brockman isnt quite so convinced

programme.title: Sunday Brunch
programme.desc: Tim Lovejoy and Simon Rimmer chat to astronaut Tim Peake, in a highlight from Sunday Brunch

programme.desc: Three couples from Birmingham compete to win the £1,000 prize, including Helen and her husband Lorne, who aim to channel their 24 years together into a safe, solid menu. Meanwhile, Rob is so entranced by his Lithuanian wife Egle that he regularly feels the need to pinch himself whenever he looks at her

programme.title: George Clarkes Old House, New Home
programme.desc: The architect advises more people make their period homes fit for modern life. George also travels to Hove to meet Louis and Sarah, who are tackling the upstairs of their 16th-century gatehouse

programme.title: Countdown
programme.desc: Colin Murray and Rachel Riley host the words-and-numbers game, with Mike Bubbins joining Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Part two of two. A glamorous TV executive makes Sam an offer he cannot refuse, but Diane points out there are certain strings attached

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: As Sam and Diane finally get together, their bar-room pals grow increasingly pessimistic about the relationship. Comedy, starring Ted Danson

programme.title: Cheers
programme.desc: Cliff falls head over heels for Carlas not-so-innocent little sister, and it is up to the gang to tell him the truth about her. American bar-room comedy, starring Ted Danson

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra tires of having to deal with Rays interfering mother, grumpy father and resentful brother, who constantly show up out of the blue, and a white lie has embarrassing consequences. Pilot episode of the comedy, starring Ray Romano and Patricia Heaton

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Debra sees newlywed friends making a public display of affection, and cannot help wondering why Raymond has so much trouble telling her he loves her. Ray Romano stars

programme.title: Everybody Loves Raymond
programme.desc: Ray gives the eulogy at a family funeral, but his Aunt Alda spoils the solemnity of the event by rekindling a seven-year-old feud with his mother. American comedy, starring Ray Romano and Jean Stapleton

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The Seattle shrink takes his teenage son Frederick on a camping trip with Martin in a bid to rebuild their relationship. Comedy, starring Kelsey Grammer and John Mahoney

programme.title: Frasier

Meanwhile, Martin takes over the training when Roz gets Alice a puppy

programme.title: Frasier
programme.desc: The brothers agree to produce a one-man show for a washed-up Shakespearean actor they idolised as children, but discover his talent has completely deserted him, and set out to save face with a spot of kidnapping. With guest stars Derek Jacobi and Patrick Macnee

programme.title: Lee Evans Live: The Different Planet Tour
programme.desc: The comedian delivers a stand-up performance as he finishes his 1996 UK tour with a gig in Londons West End. Among the topics of discussion are planes, shops and restaurants

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: Rowan Atkinson slips into silly mode once more as his comic alter ego visits the launderette and somehow manages to lose his trousers, getting himself into a real pickle as he tries to retrieve them. Fully dressed again, he moves on to the crazy golf course, where the relatively simple task of hitting the ball leads to utter chaos

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: Everyones favourite idiot visits hospital to cure a nasty little problem, but proves to be a somewhat impatient outpatient, and later has trouble sleeping. Starring Rowan Atkinson

programme.desc: The blunderingly inept master of disaster goes for a haircut, but ends up styling the other customers hair. Later, he causes chaos at a school fun day. Comedy, starring Rowan Atkinson

Rowan Atkinson stars in the first episode of the celebrated comedy, with Richard Briers, Rudolph Walker and Howard Goodall

programme.title: Mr Bean
programme.desc: The buffoon wreaks havoc when he goes shopping and dines at an exclusive restaurant - and there is an unfortunate incident when he meets a member of the royal family at a film premiere. Rowan Atkinson stars

programme.title: Impractical Jokers
programme.desc: Q, Murr and Sal clean out their garages before giving truly spooky presentations, while David Cross brings a sense of danger to the losing joker

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross discovers who mugged him as a child and Chandlers internship gets off to an uninspiring start. Meanwhile, Joey endures a draining audition at the hands of a self-important actor. Guest starring Jeff Goldblum and Tenacious Ds Kyle Gass

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Boob Job
programme.desc: Cash-strapped couple Chandler and Monica conceal from each other that they have asked Joey for money. Rachel goes overboard in a bid to make her home baby-friendly, while Phoebe asks Mike to move in with her, but has second thoughts once it becomes clear he does not share her enthusiasm for marriage

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Memorial Service
programme.desc: A joke entry on Rosss college website backfires on Chandler. Joey refuses to give Emma his favourite stuffed toy, and weak-willed Phoebe begs Monica to help her avoid contacting Mike. Comedy, starring Matthew Perry and Matt LeBlanc

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Everyone except Ross pools their money to buy lottery tickets, but a disagreement about how to spend any winnings prompts a disdainful Phoebe to make a rash gesture. Chandler frets as he waits for a phone call that could mean a new job, and Rachel thinks Emma is close to saying her first word

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel joins Joey on the set of his soap opera, where a steamy love scene inspires unexpected feelings - and a disturbing dream. Phoebe takes an opportunity to serenade a captive audience, while Chandler plans to whisk Monica away - but ends up inviting Ross. Jennifer Aniston and Matt LeBlanc star

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Soap Opera Party
programme.desc: Joey throws a party for the cast of Days of Our Lives, but refuses to invite his pals in case their behaviour embarrasses him. However, the answering machine gives the game away and everyone attends - which is good news for Ross

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Fertility Test
programme.desc: Chandler and Monica go to a fertility clinic for tests, but are embarrassed to encounter an old acquaintance. Ross helps Joey pretend to be intelligent to woo Charlie, even though he is attracted to her himself, and Rachel sneaks into a spa for a massage

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Monica and Chandler conduct an embarrassing interview with a potential sperm donor after learning they cannot conceive a baby naturally. Rachel reveals she still has feelings for Joey, but his current girlfriend overhears her confession, and Phoebe bumps into her old boyfriend David. Comedy, guest starring John Stamos and Hank Azaria

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Double bill. The gang visits Barbados to hear Ross address a convention, but Chandler manages to destroy the only copy of his keynote speech. Joey and Rachel impersonate pharmacists to infiltrate a medical conference offering free drinks, while Mike arrives unexpectedly and proposes to Phoebe

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One After Joey and Rachel Kiss
programme.desc: Rachel and Joey struggle to find the words to tell Ross about their kiss in Barbados, while Phoebe makes the alarming discovery that Mike has a girlfriend. Starring Jennifer Aniston, Matt LeBlanc and Lisa Kudrow

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Ross Is Fine
programme.desc: Ross tries to put on a brave face and invites Joey and Rachel to dinner with him and Charlie, but gets drunk and makes an embarrassing scene. Frank Jr tries to talk Phoebe into taking care of one of the triplets, while Chandler and Monica learn more about adoption

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross goes to a spray-tanning salon, but his failure to follow the instructions leaves him with a complexion he was not looking for. Joey and Rachel prepare to sleep together for the first time, but the night proves more awkward than romantic. Guest starring Jennifer Coolidge

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Monica and Chandler decide to delay their trip to Vermont to celebrate Emmas first birthday, but the party takes an unexpected turn with the delivery of a risque birthday cake. Comedy, guest starring Elliott Gould

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Rachels Sister Babysits
programme.desc: Christina Applegate reprises her role as Rachels clueless sister Amy, who offers to babysit Emma and ends up giving the unfortunate child a makeover. Phoebe inadvertently spoils Mikes anniversary surprise, and Joey writes a letter of recommendation for the Bings. Comedy, guest starring Christina Applegate and Paul Rudd

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Greg Kinnear guest stars as Charlies Nobel Prize-winning old flame, who is overseeing a grant Ross desperately wants. Rachel and Monica try to foist on each other one of Phoebes peculiar paintings. Comedy, guest starring Aisha Tyler (Archer) and Greg Kinnear (I Dont Know How She Does It)

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Home Study
programme.desc: Ross discovers Rachel has an irrational fear of swings, while Phoebe and Mike argue about whether to give their wedding fund to charity. The Bings learn Joey had a one-night stand with the adoption worker handling their case, and worry he has ruined their chances

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Late Thanksgiving
programme.desc: Monica reluctantly agrees to cook Thanksgiving dinner, but the others all turn up late, so she and Chandler angrily lock them out - until an unexpected phone call changes their mood completely

programme.title: Austin Powers: International Man of Mystery (1997)
programme.desc: A velvet-clad, sex-crazed secret agent from the 1960s agrees to be put into a state of suspended animation after his arch-enemy escapes justice. Thirty years later he is defrosted to do battle with the power-mad villain again, but the mission proves nearly as daunting for him as getting to grips with 1990s social values. programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Birth Mother
programme.desc: Monica and Chandler travel to Ohio to meet the mother of the baby they plan to adopt. The pregnant mother, Erica, likes them but only because their files got mixed up with a doctor and a female minister. Meanwhile, Joey is set up on a date with one of Phoebes friends, but soon regrets it when she tries to take some food off his plate, and Ross has a fashion faux pas when he accidently wears womens clothing on a date

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Chandler Gets Caught
programme.desc: Rachel and Phoebe see Chandler getting into a car with a mystery woman and follow them to a large house in the suburbs. They tell Monica of their fears and are shocked to hear the truth. Comedy, starring Jennifer Aniston, Lisa Kudrow and Matthew Perry

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where the Stripper Cries
programme.desc: Joey appears on quiz show The $100,000 Pyramid, but his disastrous efforts to answer the questions end up costing his partner the prize money. Meanwhile, the revellers at Phoebes hen party get a surprise once the stripper shows up. Guest starring Danny DeVito and Donny Osmond

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebes big day arrives, but wedding planner Monica and stand-in father of the bride Joey take their roles a little too seriously. To make matters worse, a blizzard hits New York and one of Mikes ushers is indisposed, forcing Ross and Chandler to step into the breach

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Joey Speaks French
programme.desc: Joey persuades Phoebe to teach him French for an important audition, while Monica and Chandler show a pregnant Erica the sights of New York and learn more about the babys possible father. Guest starring Anna Faris and Ron Leibman

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Rachel heads to a restaurant for a job interview, only to find herself sitting at a table within earshot of her current boss. Meanwhile, Monica and Chandler go house-hunting and Phoebe decides to change her name. Guest starring Paul Rudd and Dakota Fanning

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Phoebe learns Joeys agent has died, but he is so upset about his friends moving away that she decides not to tell him. Rachel worries about relocating to France, while Monica and Chandler are horrified to discover Janice is planning to buy the house next door to them. Guest starring Jane Lynch (Glee)

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with Rachels Going Away Party
programme.desc: The gang throws a going-away party for Rachel, but she prefers to say her goodbyes individually - and one of her friends is left feeling hurt at being overlooked. Meanwhile, Monica supervises the packing for a new life in the suburbs with Chandler, while also keeping a close eye on the mother of their future adopted child

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The Last One (Parts One and Two)
programme.desc: Double bill. The last-ever episode of the comedy sees the pals facing major changes. There is a surprise in store for Monica and Chandler when Erica finally gives birth to the child they are planning to adopt, Phoebe and Mike decide to start a family of their own and Rachel gets set to begin a new life in Paris. Jennifer Aniston, Courteney Cox, Lisa Kudrow, Matt LeBlanc, Matthew Perry and David Schwimmer star

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: Pilot (The One Where Monica Gets a Room-mate)
programme.desc: The first-ever episode of the comedy, in which Rachel arrives at the local cafe after jilting her fiance at the altar. Chandler and Joey encourage Ross to enjoy bachelorhood when his lesbian wife walks out on him, while Phoebe supports herself playing guitar in the subway. Courteney Cox, Jennifer Aniston, David Schwimmer, Matthew Perry and Lisa Kudrow star

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Sonogram at the End
programme.desc: Carol tells Ross she plans to raise his child with her lover Susan, but he can be involved if he wants. Ross and Monicas parents announce they are coming to dinner, while Rachel is aghast to discover her former fiance went on what would have been their honeymoon with her maid of honour

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Monica shows off her new boyfriend to the rest of the group, Chandler decides to take up smoking again and Phoebe makes a gruesome discovery that leads to her receiving a windfall. Starring Courteney Cox, Matthew Perry and Lisa Kudrow

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: The girls end up breaking out binoculars in order to catch a glimpse of a good-looking neighbour with White House connections after accidentally receiving a pizza that he ordered, while Joey and Chandler take Ross to a ice hockey game to keep his mind busy

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the East German Laundry Detergent

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Chandler begins a relationship with a married woman, Ross tries to liven up his conservative image and Joey lands a film role with a difference - as a naked body-double for Al Pacino

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: A power cut exposes Chandler to temptation by trapping him in a banks ATM lobby with only a stunning model for company. Ross has a hard time trying to ask Rachel out on a date, and Joey learns something interesting about Monica

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One Where Nana Dies Twice
programme.desc: The pals gather to pay their last respects at the funeral of Ross and Monicas grandmother, while Chandler is disturbed to discover his colleagues all assume he is gay - and even more shocked to find out who they want to set him up with. Featuring guest appearances by Elliott Gould and Christina Pickles

programme.title: Junior (1994)
programme.desc: A fertility expert pioneers a treatment enabling men to become pregnant and carry babies to full term. When the authorities cancel funding for the research, he decides to test it on himself, but gives little thought to how difficult it will be to keep it a secret. The situation is further complicated when he starts to fall for the woman whose child he is carrying. Comedy, with Arnold Schwarzenegger, Danny DeVito, Emma Thompson and Frank Langella

programme.desc: The comedian hosts another evening of entertainment at Londons Theatre Royal on Drury Lane. The host also hijacks Dragons Den star Peter Jones mobile phone in Celebrity Send To All, which sees him fire off an embarrassing message to all the contacts in Jones directory, and makes dreams come true for an unsuspecting electrician in Unexpected Star

programme.title: Michael McIntyres Big Show
programme.desc: The comedian hosts another evening of entertainment at Londons Theatre Royal on Drury Lane. programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross and Phoebe end up getting into a debate over the validity of the evolutionary process. Monica and Rachel receive all of Mr Heckles belongings when the strange man passes away, and Chandler realises that their neighbour was similar to him

programme.title: Friends

programme.sub-title: The One with the Boob Job

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Everyone except Ross pools their money to buy lottery tickets, but a disagreement about how to spend any winnings prompts a disdainful Phoebe to make a rash gesture. programme.desc: Rachel joins Joey on the set of his soap opera, where a steamy love scene inspires unexpected feelings - and a disturbing dream. programme.sub-title: The One with the Soap Opera Party

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The One with the Fertility Test
programme.desc: Chandler and Monica go to a fertility clinic for tests, but are embarrassed to encounter an old acquaintance. Ross helps Joey pretend to be intelligent to woo Charlie, even though he is attracted to her himself, and Rachel sneaks into a spa for a massage

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Monica and Chandler conduct an embarrassing interview with a potential sperm donor after learning they cannot conceive a baby naturally. programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Double bill. The gang visits Barbados to hear Ross address a convention, but Chandler manages to destroy the only copy of his keynote speech. programme.sub-title: The One Where Ross Is Fine

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Ross goes to a spray-tanning salon, but his failure to follow the instructions leaves him with a complexion he was not looking for. Joey and Rachel prepare to sleep together for the first time, but the night proves more awkward than romantic. Guest starring Jennifer Coolidge

programme.title: Friends
programme.desc: Monica and Chandler decide to delay their trip to Vermont to celebrate Emmas first birthday, but the party takes an unexpected turn with the delivery of a risque birthday cake. Comedy, guest starring Elliott Gould

programme.sub-title: The One Where Rachels Sister Babysits

programme.desc: Phoebes big day arrives, but wedding planner Monica and stand-in father of the bride Joey take their roles a little too seriously. To make matters worse, a blizzard hits New York and one of Mikes ushers is indisposed, forcing Ross and Chandler to step into the breach

programme.title: Friends
programme.sub-title: The Last One (Parts One and Two)
programme.desc: Double bill. The last-ever episode of the comedy sees the pals facing major changes. There is a surprise in store for Monica and Chandler when Erica finally gives birth to the child they are planning to adopt, Phoebe and Mike decide to start a family of their own and Rachel gets set to begin a new life in Paris. Jennifer Aniston, Courteney Cox, Lisa Kudrow, Matt LeBlanc, Matthew Perry and David Schwimmer star

programme.desc: The girls end up breaking out binoculars in order to catch a glimpse of a good-looking neighbour with White House connections after accidentally receiving a pizza that he ordered, while Joey and Chandler take Ross to a ice hockey game to keep his mind busy

programme.title: Rude(ish) Tube
programme.desc: Comedy clips showcasing amusing internet videos featuring sports of the lawnmower, motorcycle and bicycle variety

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: With prom night approaching, Adam worries that Brea will ditch him for a more popular guy. Erica struggles with how to support Geoff when he receives bad news

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: When Beverly announces a family vacation to Miami, Erica suspects she is up to something, and Murray grapples with his fear of flying

programme.title: Modern Family

Meanwhile, Mitchell and Cameron have an argument over the formers aversion to public displays of affection, and Gloria believes that her grandmother has been visiting in her dreams. Comedy, starring Ed ONeill

programme.title: Black Books
programme.desc: Mannys parents come to stay, and Bernard strives to get rid of them, while Fran has her own reasons for wanting them to leave. It soon becomes clear that Manny may not have been completely honest about his achievements. Comedy, guest starring Annette Crosbie (One Foot in the Grave) and Sam Kelly (Allo Allo!)

programme.title: Black Books
programme.desc: As if smoking and drinking heavily were not bad enough, a bet on the Grand National sends Bernard spiralling into yet another addiction - gambling. As his ailing finances suffer the consequences of his latest vice, he decides it is time to actually sell some books - but it may be too late. Guest starring Keith Allen, with Dylan Moran and Tamsin Greig

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Sean Lock and Kerry Godliman take on Jon Richardson and Joe Wilkinson in the comedy words and numbers quiz, while Mr Swallow - aka Nick Mohammed - joins Susie Dent in Dictionary Corner. Hosted by Jimmy Carr with Rachel Riley looking after the numbers and letters

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Kent, Katie is first up with a menu suited to her husband Dans huge appetite, but their massive portion sizes prove a challenge to some. Day two sees the turn of wedding DJ Simon and his wife Jacqui, who flummox their guests with a French-language menu, before city broker Paul and his beauty therapist wife Claire hope a dance-off and a ginger dessert will be enough to beat the other two couples to the £1,000

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Farmers James and Louisa host the first of three dinner parties in Kent, although beautician Rachel doesnt approve of their kill it, cook it theme - and to make matters worse, the hosts also put their foot in it with her husband Keith. Competitive couple Lance and Tina try to smooth things over on the second night, although no one likes the sound of their dessert, leaving glamorous Rachel and Keith to serve up a classy menu on the final night. Will it be enough to bag them the prize money?

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Party-loving Jake plans his wedding to image-conscious bride-to-be Rosie, who dreams of a more intimate affair

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Groom-to-be Harry wants a wedding fit for royalty, but his partner Charlotte is not into airs and graces and is dreaming of something much more low key

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Impulsive groom Steve plans a cliff-hanger of a Wild West wedding, but demanding bride-to-be Leona dreams of a more sophisticated do

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Fun-loving groom-to-be Liam wants a wedding day that really celebrates his native Isle of Wight, but his future wife Kandi is hoping for a more conventional day

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Laid-back Liam plans to wow his bride with a wintry white wedding. But almost 2,000 miles away in Portugal, bride-to-be Georgia is dreaming of sun, sand and sangria. Will Liam get everyone in the Christmas spirit, or will Georgia lose that loving feeling?

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: President of Moes Southwest Grill, Paul Damico, goes undercover to check the standards he values are still being met. The company is one of the worlds fastest growing restaurant chains with 10,000 employees and Paul wants to look for opportunities to assist his staff in a similar way to how his family were helped by his fathers bosses during his childhood

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Sara Bittorf goes undercover among the workforce of restaurant chain Boston Market, where she is chief brand officer. Disguising herself as an out-of-work waitress trying to win the chance to open up her own eatery by taking part in a bogus reality TV show, she tries to revive the companys image by learning more about its staff

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef takes on one of his toughest challenges yet, J Willys Bar and Grille in South Bend, Indiana, which has amassed debts of more than $1million. On finding an inexperienced chef serving food from both the freezer and tins, together with service that reduces one customer to tears, Gordon Ramsay orders an overnight deep-clean of the premises and designs a menu to inspire the kitchen staff

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay heads to West Nyack, New York, to come to the aid of a family-run Mexican restaurant that is suffering a financial crisis, and a case of hard-headed patriarchy. When the chef arrives he finds himself turfing out the existing customers for their own safety due to a cockroach infestation on the premises

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay travels to the upmarket quarter of Hollywood to help the owner of failing health-food restaurant Sante La Brea. As well as struggling to control his disrespectful staff, the proprietor receives a surprise visit from the police at the height of dinner service

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef travels to La Grange, a suburb of Chicago, to help the owners of Cafe 36, an upmarket bistro threatening to destroy the marriage of its owners due to the scale of their financial losses. programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Fiery chef Gordon Ramsay comes to the aid of a mother-and-son team who have gone through 20 chefs in two years at their struggling Italian restaurant in California. The adjoining bar is a triumph, but the oldest dining establishment in town needs an overhaul if the inexperienced owners are to make a profit

programme.title: 8 Out of 10 Cats Does Countdown
programme.desc: Jimmy Carr hosts a hybrid of the comedy panel show and the words-and-numbers quiz, as Jon Richardson and Asim Chaudhry take on Joe Wilkinson and Roisin Conaty. programme.title: Greg Davies: Firing Cheeseballs at a Dog
programme.desc: Comedian Greg Daviess hugely successful and acclaimed debut stand-up show from 2011, in which he sets out to chronicle the significant issues surrounding modern life in his own irreverent style. programme.title: Black Books
programme.desc: Manny decides to broaden the customers horizons and organises a festival of travel writing - but is horrified when Fran falls for the well-groomed guest speaker. programme.title: Black Books
programme.desc: While Bernard seems quite happy in the filthy shop, Manny and Fran decide a change of scenery is well overdue, and plan a big night out. programme.desc: Extended version of the panel show hosted by Jimmy Carr, with Micky Flanagan, Hari Kondabolu, Tess Daly and Krishnan Guru-Murthy joining captains Sean Lock and Jon Richardson

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Groom Ian uses the £12,000 budget to fly him and his two best men out to Thailand to buy cut-price suits and a bargain wedding dress - and have an exotic stag do too. However, his trip may not pay off in the long run for his down-to-earth bride Jay

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Rock star-turned-zookeeper Scott plans a jungle-themed wedding for his bride-to-be Verity - and spends only £100 on a wedding dress for her, and £1,800 on life-size plastic animals to decorate their reception

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Dave, a would-be groom with an obsessive fondness for the sea plans to whisk his water-phobic fiancee Rosie off for a remote wedding on wind-swept Lundy Island off the coast of Devon. After three weeks of battling the elements, and struggling to win over his intendeds close-knit family, Dave hopes his risky plan will pay off

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Andy Wirth - the CEO of a California ski resort - goes undercover to learn more about his companys working practices as he prepares to merge an existing operation with a new acquisition

programme.desc: Andy Wiederhorn, CEO of Los Angeles-based fast food restaurant Fatburger, goes incognito among his employees in order to learn more about his business that has evolved from a late-night hangout for musicians in the 1950s to an international success story

programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: In Belfast, Gemma and husband Jim serve up a healthy menu that caters for pescatarians as well carnivores. programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples from Belfast compete to host the best dinner party and walk away with the cash prize of £1,000. programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples from in and around Cardiff compete to host the best dinner party and walk away with the cash prize of £1,000. programme.title: Couples Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Three couples from south Wales compete to host the best dinner party and walk away with the cash prize of £1,000. programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay revisits some of the restaurants that he set out to save, including the Mixing Bowl, the Olde Stone Mill, Peters and Campania. Have their owners pulled themselves out of their nightmares?

programme.desc: The chef again comes to the aid of failing American restaurants, starting in Fishtown, Philadelphia, where he tries to help the three owners of the Hot Potato Cafe, which has not made a profit in two years. Spurred on by a scathing review by an influential critic, he makes radical changes to alter the staffs attitudes and create food that is up to his own exacting standards

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef travels to Flamangos restaurant in Whitehouse, New Jersey, where he tries to help the mother-and-daughter owners turn around their struggling businesss fortunes. programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay visits Mojito, a Cuban cafe in Brooklyn, New York. The restaurant was the shared dream of two newlyweds who have separated since its opening, and whose constant public quarrelling is distracting staff and driving customers away

programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Armando Montelongo, the CEO of a Texas property investment company, is worried that the firms rapid growth means he no longer has any interaction with the staff at the heart of his business. programme.title: Undercover Boss USA
programme.desc: Gina Butler, the founder of one of Americas most successful bakeries, dons a disguise to go incognito among her employees, posing as a contestant on a reality show. programme.title: Property Brothers: Buying and Selling
programme.desc: Its hammer time in the third series where the property brothers work their makeover magic. Will helping these homeowners be as tough as nails or as easy as flipping a switch? But although they thought theyd found their forever home, their house is aesthetically challenged. Which isnt helped when Jonathan uncovers bad news. programme.desc: Teams from Bradford and Huddersfield compete, with married couple Sophie and Harj kicking things off with a Mexican menu - if Harj can find his way around the kitchen. And can Sean and Janes evening of laughs scoop them the prize?

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Lawyer and bingo pro Arunima shares a date with veterinary surgeon Simon. Arunima is in a wheelchair, and is worried Simon wont be able to see past her disability. These concerns are soon allayed though, as his inability to grasp bingo lingo takes precedence. Among others being paired up are retired factory worker Margaret and former bookmaker David - who has considered himself a long odds outsider at finding romance - and nursery worker Darcy, who is hoping to get a good reception from television aerial erector Aaron

programme.desc: Zoe from London is confident but is finding it hard to meet someone who will embrace her sass and body hair. programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Maitre d Fred hosts a special festive party in which he welcomes back some of the couples who found love in the restaurant, as well as three unlucky daters returning for a second chance at romance. Supermarket worker Luke, fireman Paul and eccentric theology student Louisa are all determined not to be left alone under the mistletoe by the end of the night, while the successful pairings are all happy to be back at the place they found love - and when one of the lovers surprises their partner by getting down on one knee, it makes it a Christmas they will never forget

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: Simon passes his driving test, so the lads decide to take a trip to a theme park. programme.title: The Inbetweeners

programme.title: The Goldbergs
