programme.desc: Murrays business rival makes him an offer he cannot refuse, and Adam and Erica offer Ms Cinoman the chance to perform their original stage show

programme.desc: Party fanatic Sonny plans a zoo-themed Ibiza beach party wedding, but his wife-to-be Jazmin wants a sophisticated and timeless wedding

programme.desc: The chef tries to transform the fortunes of Sebastians, a pizzeria in Burbank, Los Angeles, which is failing to attract customers, leaving the owner in debt and struggling to support his family. programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The fiery chef tries to change the fortunes of Finn McCools, a traditional Irish pub in the Hamptons, New York. programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The second Commitment Ceremony erupts with accusations, heartbreak and a shock exit as alliances fracture, one marriage ends and the experiment is left permanently shaken

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia

programme.desc: Cowboy doll Woody is stolen by an unscrupulous toy collector, who knows he is worth a fortune, prompting fearless Space Ranger Buzz Lightyear to lead a daring mission across town to rescue him. programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa goes on an archaeological dig with the school, and uncovers an unusual fossil, which the townsfolk are convinced is the skeleton of an angel. Thinking he can make a profit out of the find, Homer steals it, puts it in his garage, and charges people to see it. With the guest voice of scientist Stephen Jay Gould

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge takes a job as an estate agent, but her honesty with potential buyers costs her lucrative sales and gets her into hot water with the boss, who issues an ultimatum. The Flanders agree to buy one of the agencys houses - unaware of the propertys gruesome past

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart accidentally destroys the familys Christmas presents and evades blame by claiming they were stolen by a burglar, prompting the Springfield residents to open their hearts and wallets in an overwhelming show of charity toward the family. programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer rents a Western for the family to watch, but is disappointed when it turns out to be a musical, so the family reminds him of musical highlights from past episodes. Featuring the guest voice of George Harrison

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: A sleazy carnival worker and his son lose their jobs thanks to Homer, and end up moving in with the Simpson family - whose home they proceed to take over and completely wreck. With the guest voice of Jim Varney

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: The Strong Arms of the Ma
programme.desc: Marge is mugged at the supermarket and develops a fear of venturing outdoors - until she starts a fitness regimen with Homers old weights and develops muscles guaranteed to deter any would-be assailant

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Nicole is determined to avoid any association with singleton Bridget Jones. Bella - donned in a figure-hugging latex dress - seeks a like-minded chap willing to embrace the fetish world, and sets her hopes on Harrow boy Bertie. programme.title: Vicky Pattison: Maybe, Baby?
programme.desc: Part one of two. Vicky and her husband Ercan decide whether they should start a family. She also returns to the fertility clinic where her frozen eggs and embryos are being stored, confronting the reality of her ticking body clock

programme.title: Vicky Pattison: Maybe, Baby?
programme.desc: Vicky and Ercan explore more options for starting a family, meeting a mum who had her children through surrogacy and speaking to an adoptive mum as they continue searching for answers. But will these conversations help them make a decision on becoming parents, or lead them to the difficult realisation that parenthood isnt right for them?

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Alexs new company puts her up at a new luxury apartment with full amenities - and a list of high-profile residents that everyone is eager to take advantage of, without her knowing. Meanwhile, Luke and Manny head straight for the gym to try to pick up older women and end up in hot water. Guest starring Courtney Cox and Stephen Merchant

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil pays a visit to his dad to make sure he is okay after hearing some concerning news about him. Meanwhile, Jay gives Claire and Mitch some of their old childhood memorabilia, which prompts them to revaluate a long-held memory of their first family vacation

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: When Ren decides to host an Earth Day telethon, Barry vows to help her book some A-list talent. Beverly and her nemesis square off to find a perfect match for Bill

programme.title: Patrick (2018)

programme.desc: The chef heads to family owned Italian restaurant Giuseppis in Macomb Township, Michigan. Nevertheless, he sets about rescuing them from disaster and turning around the failing business

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: Gordon Ramsay comes to the aid of a restaurant in Mount Sinai, New York, which appears to be stuck in the 1980s. The crumbling decor and unenthusiastic head chef at the Handlebar need to be tackled, but owners Bill and Carolyn LeRoy are in denial about the problems they face

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The two new couples head off on their honeymoons, featuring an unlikely third wheel, frank confessions, and a groom with views that infuriate his new wife

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: Three new couples prepare themselves for their first dinner party but, after the tension and strife of the last one, the atmosphere is far from welcoming

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart is horrified at Marges attempts to make him befriend Ralph Wiggum - until he learns his police chief dad has a master key to every shop in Springfield. programme.title: The Simpsons

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: Three new couples prepare themselves for their first dinner party but, after the tension and strife of the last one, the atmosphere is far from welcoming

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Lawyer and bingo pro Arunima shares a date with veterinary surgeon Simon. Arunima is in a wheelchair, and is worried Simon wont be able to see past her disability. These concerns are soon allayed though, as his inability to grasp bingo lingo takes precedence. Among others being paired up are retired factory worker Margaret and former bookmaker David - who has considered himself a long odds outsider at finding romance - and nursery worker Darcy, who is hoping to get a good reception from television aerial erector Aaron

programme.title: Naked Attraction
programme.desc: Zoe from London is confident but is finding it hard to meet someone who will embrace her sass and body hair. Derry from Wigan says his jet-set lifestyle is getting in the way of finding someone to settle down with. Anna Richardson invites them both to choose a date from a selection of six naked people, whose bodies are revealed one section at a time

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Maitre d Fred hosts a special festive party in which he welcomes back some of the couples who found love in the restaurant, as well as three unlucky daters returning for a second chance at romance. Supermarket worker Luke, fireman Paul and eccentric theology student Louisa are all determined not to be left alone under the mistletoe by the end of the night, while the successful pairings are all happy to be back at the place they found love - and when one of the lovers surprises their partner by getting down on one knee, it makes it a Christmas they will never forget

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: Simon passes his driving test, so the lads decide to take a trip to a theme park. However, things start to go wrong when their route is obstructed by a funeral cortege and the newly qualified motorist has an accident in the car park. Later, Will regrets ever making the journey when he disgraces himself on a rollercoaster

programme.title: The Inbetweeners
programme.desc: Will discovers that attending a mixed-sex school is not so bad after all when he manages to get a date with the most popular girl in the year above. However, his growing obsession with her begins to alienate him from his friends. Comedy, starring Simon Bird, Joe Thomas, James Buckley and Blake Harrison

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.desc: As spring break arrives, Barry talks Erica, Ren and the JTP into an ill-advised discount vacation. Beverly struggles when Adam considers taking time off after high school

programme.title: The Goldbergs
programme.sub-title: The Return of the Formica King
programme.desc: Murrays business rival makes him an offer he cannot refuse, and Adam and Erica offer Ms Cinoman the chance to perform their original stage show

programme.title: Dont Tell the Bride
programme.desc: Party fanatic Sonny plans a zoo-themed Ibiza beach party wedding, but his wife-to-be Jazmin wants a sophisticated and timeless wedding

programme.title: Lego Masters Australia
programme.desc: Three teams battle it out in the grand finale, with 28 hours to showcase their skills in their most impressive builds yet before the winner is announced

programme.title: The Amazing Race Australia
programme.desc: The teams travel to the beautiful Indian coastal state of Kerala. Navigating the waterways of the West Coast Canal System, the celeb pairs must choose between tiger body painting or a traditional kids game, before an intense experience learning to drive a tuk-tuk. Finally, they must eat their way through a bowlful of bananas until they find a blue one, with one duo getting more than a gutful

programme.title: Made in Chelsea
programme.desc: Following their flirty chats, Kit and Inga head out on a date, leaving Jazz questioning why the news is bothering her so much. Jules brother Philip ramps up his feud with Chuggs, telling everyone - including Jules boyfriend Tristan - that Chuggs fancies Jules. Freddy also finds himself caught in the middle, with his loyalties split between Angus and Jack

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The chef tries to transform the fortunes of Sebastians, a pizzeria in Burbank, Los Angeles, which is failing to attract customers, leaving the owner in debt and struggling to support his family. Gordon is horrified to discover pre-processed and frozen ingredients on the menu, but there seems to be little he can do to help when he is thrown out of the kitchen

programme.title: Ramsays Kitchen Nightmares USA
programme.desc: The fiery chef tries to change the fortunes of Finn McCools, a traditional Irish pub in the Hamptons, New York. The chances of the establishment becoming a success are being ruined by the owner Buddy Mazzios two sons, bartender Jason and chef Brian, who are constantly fighting with each other, prompting Gordon to have a heart-to-heart with the family

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: The second Commitment Ceremony erupts with accusations, heartbreak and a shock exit as alliances fracture, one marriage ends and the experiment is left permanently shaken

programme.title: Married at First Sight Australia
programme.desc: Two new couples enter the experiment but, when big personalities clash, the new marriages threaten to unravel before the honeymoons have even begun

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up to Cancer
programme.desc: Molly-Mae Hague, Richard Herring, JoJo Siwa and Babatunde Aleshe join hosts Noel Fielding and Alison Hammond and judges Cherish Finden and Paul Hollywood in the tent. The celebrity bakers take on decorated traybakes in the Signature and a tarte tatin Technical, then reveal their most coveted toys from childhood in showstopping biscuits

programme.title: Toy Story 2 (1999)
programme.desc: Cowboy doll Woody is stolen by an unscrupulous toy collector, who knows he is worth a fortune, prompting fearless Space Ranger Buzz Lightyear to lead a daring mission across town to rescue him. However, Woody becomes tempted to spend his life languishing in the safety of a museum rather than face the prospect of his owner growing up. Animated sequel, featuring the voices of Tom Hanks, Tim Allen, Joan Cusack and Kelsey Grammer

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Lisa goes on an archaeological dig with the school, and uncovers an unusual fossil, which the townsfolk are convinced is the skeleton of an angel. Thinking he can make a profit out of the find, Homer steals it, puts it in his garage, and charges people to see it. With the guest voice of scientist Stephen Jay Gould

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Marge takes a job as an estate agent, but her honesty with potential buyers costs her lucrative sales and gets her into hot water with the boss, who issues an ultimatum. The Flanders agree to buy one of the agencys houses - unaware of the propertys gruesome past

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Bart accidentally destroys the familys Christmas presents and evades blame by claiming they were stolen by a burglar, prompting the Springfield residents to open their hearts and wallets in an overwhelming show of charity toward the family. With the guest voice of American TV presenter Alex Trebek

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: Homer rents a Western for the family to watch, but is disappointed when it turns out to be a musical, so the family reminds him of musical highlights from past episodes. Featuring the guest voice of George Harrison

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: A sleazy carnival worker and his son lose their jobs thanks to Homer, and end up moving in with the Simpson family - whose home they proceed to take over and completely wreck. With the guest voice of Jim Varney

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.sub-title: The Strong Arms of the Ma
programme.desc: Marge is mugged at the supermarket and develops a fear of venturing outdoors - until she starts a fitness regimen with Homers old weights and develops muscles guaranteed to deter any would-be assailant

programme.title: Celebrity Gogglebox
programme.desc: Martin and Roman Kemp, Rylan and his mum Linda, Miquita and Andi Oliver, Stacey Solomon and Joe Swash, Shaun Ryder and Bez, Jane McDonald and her best friend Sue, Fearne Cotton and Gok Wan, Nick Grimshaw and his niece Liv, Rob Beckett and Tom Allen, Melanie C and her brother Paul, and Gyles Brandreth with Lulu appraise George Clarkes Amazing Spaces, 90 Day Fiance UK, Americas Sweethearts: Dallas Cowboys Cheerleaders, Swamp People: Serpent Invasion, The Mole, The Woman in Black, and the BBCs coverage of the general election. First shown in July 2024

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: As the Goggleboxers hang up their Christmas stockings, a bumper edition of the show takes a very merry look back at the best of 2025

programme.title: Gogglebox
programme.desc: Britains favourite opinionated TV viewers share their sharp, insightful, passionate, and sometimes emotional critiques of 2023s biggest and best shows. Programmes covered include Planet Earth III, Strictly Come Dancing, The Crown, Michael McIntyres The Wheel, First Dates, Coronation Street, The Good Ship Murder, HELP! My House Is Haunted, All Creatures Great and Small, Family Fortunes and Open House: The Great Sex Experiment

programme.title: First Dates
programme.desc: Nicole is determined to avoid any association with singleton Bridget Jones. At first glance, Gary is no Mr Darcy, but the chartered surveyor assures her that this doesnt make him boring - while trying to determine how many bricks make up the restaurant. Bella - donned in a figure-hugging latex dress - seeks a like-minded chap willing to embrace the fetish world, and sets her hopes on Harrow boy Bertie. Meanwhile, fortysomething Jo is partnered with Richard Gere lookalike Gus, and Italian Paolo is paired with hotel receptionist Daniel

programme.title: Vicky Pattison: Maybe, Baby?
programme.desc: Part one of two. Vicky and her husband Ercan decide whether they should start a family. In this first episode of two, Vicky throws herself into finding out what life with a child might be like by helping to look after a friends young daughter. She also returns to the fertility clinic where her frozen eggs and embryos are being stored, confronting the reality of her ticking body clock

programme.title: Vicky Pattison: Maybe, Baby?
programme.desc: Vicky and Ercan explore more options for starting a family, meeting a mum who had her children through surrogacy and speaking to an adoptive mum as they continue searching for answers. But will these conversations help them make a decision on becoming parents, or lead them to the difficult realisation that parenthood isnt right for them?

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Alexs new company puts her up at a new luxury apartment with full amenities - and a list of high-profile residents that everyone is eager to take advantage of, without her knowing. Phil is on a mission to review the restaurants famous sliders for his food blog, while Mitch and Cam sneak in separately to meet David Beckham. Meanwhile, Luke and Manny head straight for the gym to try to pick up older women and end up in hot water. Guest starring Courtney Cox and Stephen Merchant

programme.title: Modern Family
programme.desc: Phil pays a visit to his dad to make sure he is okay after hearing some concerning news about him. Meanwhile, Jay gives Claire and Mitch some of their old childhood memorabilia, which prompts them to revaluate a long-held memory of their first family vacation

programme.desc: When Ren decides to host an Earth Day telethon, Barry vows to help her book some A-list talent. Beverly and her nemesis square off to find a perfect match for Bill

programme.title: Mary Berrys Easter Feast
programme.desc: Part one of two. Mary explores the roots of her faith through the medium of food, asking how Britain eats its way through Easter, and sharing her own favourite Easter recipes, including hot cross buns, Simnel cake and roast lamb. In this first episode, she discovers the traditions followed by diverse British families and communities during Lent and Good Friday, and the food that brings them together as each prepare for their Easter celebrations

programme.title: Mary Berrys Easter Feast
programme.desc: Part two of two. Mary explores the foods that bring different communities together on Easter Sunday, the most symbolic and meaningful feast in the Christian calendar. As well as sharing her own family favourites, Mary discovers how the Greek Orthodox community breaks the fast with tsoureki bread, spends a day with Archbishop of York John Sentamu and discovers Filipino and Italian Easter specialities. She also puts on a feast at her local church hall for everyone she has met along the way

programme.title: Mary Berry Cooks
programme.desc: The food writer and Great British Bake Off judge gives step-by-step instructions for the perfect Sunday lunch as she cooks for three generations of her family. For the main course she prepares slow-roasted shoulder of lamb with rosemary and paprika rub, served with potato and fennel gratin, and dishes up plum tarte Tatin with fruit salad for dessert

programme.title: Mary Berry Cooks
programme.desc: The food writer and Great British Bake Off judge gives advice on making a casual weekday supper for sharing around the kitchen table with friends or family. She prepares a Mediterranean platter of houmous, breadsticks, roasted vegetables and tomato and mozzarella salad, as well as lamb dhansak, cottage pie topped with dauphinoise potatoes, and a pasta dish that takes just 15 minutes. She also shows to make elderflower cordial and a crunchy apple crumble

programme.title: Classic Mary Berry
programme.desc: The food writer demonstrates a range of recipes to tempt family and friends, featuring classics, simple British dishes and modern favourites. In the first edition, Mary indulges her love of comfort food with heartwarming recipes including eggs Benedict Florentine, slow-cooked lamb shanks, and deliciously rich chocolate truffle pots, before enjoying open-fire cooking with Swedish chef Niklas Esktedt

programme.title: Michel Rouxs French Country Cooking
programme.desc: Michel meets organic rose winemaker, Raphael Pommery and cooks new season lamb. Later, he makes pork rillettes and a nougat glace with raspberry coulis

programme.title: Roux Back Down the River
programme.desc: Fly fishing and lobster on the lawn, Michel enjoys the high life, cooking up a lamb stew, roast duck, halibut with saffron and sherry and a summer pudding

programme.title: Tom Kerridge Barbecues
programme.desc: The chef shares his method for slow cooking joints of meat, including spicy slow cooked lamb shoulder, sweet and sticky short ribs and pulled beef brisket in a bun

programme.title: Tom Kerridge Barbecues
programme.desc: Tom explores some seriously spicy flavours on his BBQ. He makes fragrant lamb koftas, spicy sweet potato burgers and curried BBQ monkfish

programme.title: Tom Kerridge Secrets of the Pub Kitchen
programme.desc: Tom shares his love for the heat of the pub kitchen. Rotisserie beetroot, blow-torched mackerel and a flambeed brandy sauce are all on the menu

programme.title: Tom Kerridges Sunday Lunch

programme.title: Tom Kerridge More Sunday Lunch

programme.title: Jamies One-Pan Wonders
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver offers a solutions-based guide to make brilliantly easy and delicious meals all cooked in one pan, pot or dish. He begins with a simple frying-pan pasta, a clever twist on a fish pie thats full of flavour with none of the fuss, and a sublime roast lamb feast with a fantastic hack to speed up cooking

programme.title: Jamies One-Pan Wonders
programme.desc: Jamie takes midweek meals up a notch, as he knocks out a flavour-packed, simple gnocchi supper and giant spicy meatballs full of delicious time-saving cheats. He also turns a family favourite on its head with his upside-down fish pie

programme.title: Jamie Oliver: Together
programme.desc: The chef prepares the perfect meals for social events, beginning with a celebratory meal for family and friends to make up for 18 months of missed family milestones. He showcases a slow-roasted, rolled shoulder of lamb with a fennel, sage and spicy sausage stuffing, drizzled with a herby green sauce made with pistachio, mint and parsley. On the side, Jamie pairs it with crispy lemon roast potatoes, garlicky dressed French beans and a thyme and apricot sauce. He also creates rainbow tomato crostini topped with crumbly cheese, mango caipirinha cocktails, and individual yoghurt panna cottas with elderflower strawberries and a crushed biscuit crumb

programme.title: Jamies Money Saving Meals
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver prepares roast shoulder of lamb with all the trimmings, before turning the leftovers into Moroccan-style crispy pastillas, and makes good use of stale bread by using it as part of a panzanella salad. The chef also shows a lover of takeaways how to dish up a beef rendang from the remains of a cut of brisket, and helps two people reduce their food waste

programme.title: Jamies Money Saving Meals
programme.desc: Jamie Oliver proves that frozen fish can be just as good as fresh with his recipe for tikka curry, demonstrates a spin on the much-loved cheese and beans combo with smoky barbecue baked beans and sweet potatoes, and shows how to make hoi sin chicken wraps for just £1.69 a head. Plus, two midweek ideas to transform roast beef leftovers - a Moroccan-inspired tagine and a hot and spicy noodle soup

programme.title: Mary Berrys Easter Feast
programme.desc: Part one of two. Mary explores the roots of her faith through the medium of food, asking how Britain eats its way through Easter, and sharing her own favourite Easter recipes, including hot cross buns, Simnel cake and roast lamb. In this first episode, she discovers the traditions followed by diverse British families and communities during Lent and Good Friday, and the food that brings them together as each prepare for their Easter celebrations

programme.title: Mary Berrys Easter Feast
programme.desc: Part two of two. Mary explores the foods that bring different communities together on Easter Sunday, the most symbolic and meaningful feast in the Christian calendar. As well as sharing her own family favourites, Mary discovers how the Greek Orthodox community breaks the fast with tsoureki bread, spends a day with Archbishop of York John Sentamu and discovers Filipino and Italian Easter specialities. She also puts on a feast at her local church hall for everyone she has met along the way

programme.title: People Magazine Investigates

programme.title: Diabolical: Deadly Love

Action comedy, starring Woody Harrelson, Wesley Snipes, Jennifer Lopez and Chris Cooper

Horror, starring Olivia Williams, Holt McCallany, Bruce Greenwood and Matthew Davis

programme.desc: The competition kicks off in Birkdale on Merseyside, at Nista Boutique Rooms run by Ian and Sally Lawless. programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The Farrier in Cayton, North Yorkshire is the weeks final destination, run by mother-and-daughter duo Suzie and Dani Bushby. programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The four sets of owners reunite to settle some scores. Later, the payments and winner are revealed

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Peggy, 85, arrives at the hospital by ambulance, having injured her knee at home. Its the second time she has fallen in two months and medics want to find out if theres a more serious underlying cause. Meanwhile, the team keeps a close eye on 75-year-old Bob, who has had a suspected heart attack, and Ben, 25, isnt overly concerned by his swollen finger, until a doctor diagnoses cellulitis

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Schoolboy Eddie, 12, is brought into AandE having been hit by a car on his way home from school, and doctors are concerned he may have suffered a bleed on the brain, as well as damage to his kidneys. Meanwhile, 64-year-old Linda, who breathes with the help of a tracheostomy, arrives at Kings after experiencing respiratory failure at home, and student Amy, 20, has been coughing up blood

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Documentary following life inside one of Britains busiest AandE departments at Kings College Hospital in south London. Its Red Nose Day, but theres little to laugh about for 33-year-old Dilson, who is rushed in with knife wounds to his head and neck after being attacked outside a nightclub. Meanwhile, 79-year-old Doreen has broken her wrist in a fall at home, and parents Keeley and Michael are concerned by the fact their toddler Cydney hasnt urinated for two days

programme.title: Emergency Helicopter Medics
programme.desc: Heli-medics scramble to the Peak District, where a dirt-buggy smash has left a rider with serious injuries. A farm worker tears his arm using a potato harvester, and Daryl receives three rapid shocks as the medics race to his aid amid concerns of a cardiac arrest

programme.title: The Perfect Pitch
programme.desc: This weeks campers - Simon and Emmy, Sean and Marie, and Jen, Ian and Ellis - arrive at Blair Castle Caravan Park at the edge of the Cairngorms National Park

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The competition takes place in and around Leeds, where the first host, 38-year-old choir teacher Dionne, serves up a menu that combines European and Caribbean influences and celebrates her family favourites, with a carnival flourish thrown in for good measure

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Finance director Jane hosts the second night in Leeds. Her plan to grab the grand is to treat her guests to a night of fine dining, but she has her work cut out. Drama teacher Denver is already on the back foot with Jane, after taking offence to being called a goth on the first night. Car painter Darren is concerned that Janes menu of home-made ravioli, pork and panna cotta could win the week, but hes less impressed when it gets to the table. Painter and decorator Billy has noticed a chilling change among some of the other diners and Dionne is just glad her night is out the way so she can enjoy the rest of the week

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Drama teacher and DJ Denver hosts the third dinner party in Leeds, with a Spanish-inspired menu that also includes a prosecco van and stilt walkers on arrival

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: Billy serves up a menu of dinner-party favourites on the fourth evening in Leeds, and after an appearance from a Frank Sinatra impersonator, he has high hopes of pocketing the cash

programme.title: Come Dine with Me
programme.desc: The final night of the contest in Leeds finds Darren planning to put a fancy twist on what seems to be a basic menu. Denver still hasnt forgiven Jane to likening her to a goth on the first evening and the fact that Darren is serving goats cheese rubs salt in her wounds. Billy is concerned about the amount of mustard Darren is using in his dishes and mother-of-five Dionne causes a commotion when she offers up a hug to Jane

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Mark and Caroline want a bolthole on Spains stunning Orihuela Costa that works for all the family and is close to the golf courses. Scarlette Douglas shows them what their £100,000 budget can secure

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Janet and Andrew have been longing to retire to the Spanish sunshine of the western Costa del Sol for 10 years, so call on the expertise of Danni Menzies to seek put five impressive properties for their budget of £200,000 to for them to choose between

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Lee Juggurnauth jets off to the historic town of Mojácar in Spains Almería region to help house-hunters Christine and Howard find the perfect holiday home. After 30 years of marriage and a few difficult years back at home, the couple have decided its finally the right time to fulfil their long-held dream of buying a place in the sun. Lee sources five properties within their £50,000 budget

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Hazel searches for a holiday home in Malaga, with help from her friend Paula and guidance from Scarlette Douglas, who lines up five properties within her budget of £250,000

programme.title: A Place in the Sun
programme.desc: Jo and DP are looking for a holiday home in Nerja on Spains ever-popular Costa del Sol that they can escape to in the winter and rent out in the summer to support them in their retirement. Ben Hillman lines up five options for the pair to consider

programme.title: Kirstie and Phils Love It or List It
programme.desc: Kirstie Allsopp and Phil Spencer help a pair of baptist ministers with their four-bedroom in Alnwick, Northumberland. Having grown up on the same street, Chris is ready for a change of scenery and a bigger, more user-friendly space for combining work and family needs - including fitting up to 14 people round a dining table. Caroline, however, loves their home, and particularly the neighbours who brought her, Chris and their teenagers comfort while she was undergoing cancer treatment

programme.title: George Clarkes Remarkable Renovations
programme.desc: George meets Matt, who bought a Victorian terrace in Laceby with a derelict bakery in the back garden. Most people would have knocked it down or used it for storage but not Matt. He hatched a plan to convert it into a home for his sister Charlene and nephew Louis. A home on one level would be life-changing for them, but the renovation isnt easy, as Matt wants to work to a tight £50,000 budget and do most of the work himself

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off at The Bickford Arms in Holsworthy, Devon, where self-confessed rookie Keith Reynolds hopes his charisma can win over his more experienced rivals. BandB veteran Collette and her bar supervisor Danny think their bathroom is a bit grubby, and Mike and Justin find some problematic paintwork. At the breakfast table, Abby causes commotion ordering a poached egg and Collette makes it clear that only awkward people order them. Collettes honesty doesnt end there, as she reveals that her sausages are better than Keiths, leaving her rivals with high expectations

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Abby Norton welcomes her fellow hoteliers to Newchester Farmhouse BandB in Merriott, Somerset. Collette and Danny are impressed by the superstar quality beds, although Justin and Mike find the linen lacking - and Keith just misses modern technology

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third stay is at the Quay Inn in Minehead, Somerset, where Collette Whiteoak and Danny Kelly are confident their traditional pub atmosphere will be a hit with their rivals. But there are a few cleanliness issues, and the battle of the banger continues over breakfast

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Justin Head and Mike Smyth host the final visit of the week at Old Walls Vineyard Luxury Lodges in Bishopsteignton in Devon. On arrival, Abby is captivated by the stunning location, but Collette and Danny find fault with their luxury lodge. During breakfast, Danny deems his egg more greasy spoon than fancy bistro. Come feedback time, Justin and Mike are left feeling furious

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandBers meet for the last time to find out how much theyve been paid and to settle some scores. Keith clears up Collettes cleanliness critique, as well as the paintwork problems flagged by Mike and Justin. Abby gets to grips with Keiths lack of TV and wi-fi provision, and Collette and Danny want to tackle Mike and Justins cleanliness comments

programme.title: The Emergency Ward
programme.desc: Doctors Jonathan and Ruth examine a motorcyclist who cant feel his legs after he collided with a car. A dentistry student evacuated out of the Middle East has shocking shrapnel wounds, and Dr Tsung fears that she may lose her eye. Meanwhile, doctors Manny and Scott must quickly reset the shoulder of an apprentice electrician who has losing the feeling in his hand

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Doctors are concerned that 38-year-old Stacie may be paralysed following a fall from a tree at a friends all-night party, while 19-year-old veterinary student Ashleigh is rushed into AandE after being involved in a high-speed head-on car crash. Elsewhere, Peter, 78, arrives at Kings with abdominal pains, and as he receives treatment, he paints a picture of his eventful life

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: This edition focuses on the treatment of sport enthusiasts who have had accidents on two wheels. Billy, 19, has been thrown 20ft from his motocross bike during a race, suffering multiple spinal injuries. programme.title: Find It, Fix It, Flog It

programme.desc: A motorcycle collision on the M25 creates chaos as the heli-medics close carriageways to treat a driver with an injured leg. Caroline, however, loves their home, and particularly the neighbours who brought her, Chris and their teenagers comfort while she was undergoing cancer treatment

programme.title: George Clarkes Remarkable Renovations
programme.desc: George meets Matt, who bought a Victorian terrace in Laceby with a derelict bakery in the back garden. Most people would have knocked it down or used it for storage but not Matt. He hatched a plan to convert it into a home for his sister Charlene and nephew Louis. A home on one level would be life-changing for them, but the renovation isnt easy, as Matt wants to work to a tight £50,000 budget and do most of the work himself

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The competition kicks off at The Bickford Arms in Holsworthy, Devon, where self-confessed rookie Keith Reynolds hopes his charisma can win over his more experienced rivals. BandB veteran Collette and her bar supervisor Danny think their bathroom is a bit grubby, and Mike and Justin find some problematic paintwork. At the breakfast table, Abby causes commotion ordering a poached egg and Collette makes it clear that only awkward people order them. Collettes honesty doesnt end there, as she reveals that her sausages are better than Keiths, leaving her rivals with high expectations

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Abby Norton welcomes her fellow hoteliers to Newchester Farmhouse BandB in Merriott, Somerset. Collette and Danny are impressed by the superstar quality beds, although Justin and Mike find the linen lacking - and Keith just misses modern technology

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The third stay is at the Quay Inn in Minehead, Somerset, where Collette Whiteoak and Danny Kelly are confident their traditional pub atmosphere will be a hit with their rivals. But there are a few cleanliness issues, and the battle of the banger continues over breakfast

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: Justin Head and Mike Smyth host the final visit of the week at Old Walls Vineyard Luxury Lodges in Bishopsteignton in Devon. On arrival, Abby is captivated by the stunning location, but Collette and Danny find fault with their luxury lodge. During breakfast, Danny deems his egg more greasy spoon than fancy bistro. Come feedback time, Justin and Mike are left feeling furious

programme.title: Four in a Bed
programme.desc: The BandBers meet for the last time to find out how much theyve been paid and to settle some scores. Keith clears up Collettes cleanliness critique, as well as the paintwork problems flagged by Mike and Justin. Abby gets to grips with Keiths lack of TV and wi-fi provision, and Collette and Danny want to tackle Mike and Justins cleanliness comments

programme.title: The Emergency Ward
programme.desc: Doctors Jonathan and Ruth examine a motorcyclist who cant feel his legs after he collided with a car. A dentistry student evacuated out of the Middle East has shocking shrapnel wounds, and Dr Tsung fears that she may lose her eye. Meanwhile, doctors Manny and Scott must quickly reset the shoulder of an apprentice electrician who has losing the feeling in his hand

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Doctors are concerned that 38-year-old Stacie may be paralysed following a fall from a tree at a friends all-night party, while 19-year-old veterinary student Ashleigh is rushed into AandE after being involved in a high-speed head-on car crash. Elsewhere, Peter, 78, arrives at Kings with abdominal pains, and as he receives treatment, he paints a picture of his eventful life

programme.title: 24 Hours in AandE
programme.desc: Documentary following life inside one of Britains busiest AandE departments at Kings College Hospital in south London. Meanwhile, 79-year-old Doreen has broken her wrist in a fall at home, and parents Keeley and Michael are concerned by the fact their toddler Cydney hasnt urinated for two days

programme.title: Weathered: Earths Extremes
programme.desc: Maiya May goes to Cheyenne to visit a supercomputer. In Michigan, she observes the explosive end of a coal plant. Returning to Atlanta, Maiya and Dr Marshall Shepard discuss climate challenges and vulnerabilities in the United States

programme.title: Full Steam Ahead
programme.desc: Historians Ruth Goodman, Alex Langlands and Peter Ginn relive the golden age of steam. They begin by exploring how the introduction of steam railways in the early 19th century created a domestic revolution, from the way people lived to the food they ate. Arriving at Ffestiniog Railway in Snowdonia, they find out how millions of tons of slate were moved down the mountain, while underground, Alex experiences the brutal conditions face by miners in the Llechwedd Quarry

programme.title: Full Steam Ahead
programme.desc: Historians Ruth Goodman, Alex Langlands and Peter Ginn continue to relive the golden age of steam and how the Victorian railways created modern Britain. They visit Beamish in County Durham, learning how the rail companies first realised there was money to be made in moving people rather than commodities. Then Peter and Alex live the life of navvies, the men who built the thousands of miles of tracks in all weather conditions, and Ruth finds out what impact the new railroads had on the cottage industries. She also learns about the role of the guard, and the trio learn what precautions were necessary for taking a long journey on a train that was yet to include the necessary facilities

programme.title: Full Steam Ahead
programme.desc: The historians reveal how the railways transformed the British diet, rescuing a nation that was struggling to feed itself. Alex Langlands and Peter Ginn discover how the mass transportation of livestock gave birth to the traditional British roast, and Ruth Goodman is in Whitby, which became a thriving fishing town thanks to the North Yorkshire Moors Railway supplying its kippers. Plus, Hampshires watercress line, which brought nutritional salad to the masses, and how the use of steam-powered engines revolutionised production at Britains oldest brewery

programme.title: Full Steam Ahead
programme.desc: The historians take a trip on the Flying Scotsman, arguably the most famous locomotive in the world, along its original route connecting London and Edinburgh - the two most important financial capitals of the Empire. Peter Ginn explores how the railways revolutionised the delivery of mail across Britain, he and Alex Langlands learn about the first electronic communication service - more than 100 years before the arrival of email - and Ruth finds out about the role of the wheeltapper. Plus, why do some railway clocks have more than one minute hand?

programme.title: Full Steam Ahead
programme.desc: The historians explore the life of the South Devon branch line before the Beeching cuts of the 1960s. Peter Ginn joins a footplate crew and receives coal-shovelling tips from a veteran steam engine driver of 63 years experience, and with Alex he learns about one of Scotlands most lucrative exports. Ruth Goodman finds out about the dangers involved in working on the Victorian railways, and how those who lost limbs were catered for by a dedicated prosthetics workshop. She also discovers how the railways came to the rescue when a deadly disease wiped out almost the entire stock of London cattle

programme.title: Full Steam Ahead
programme.desc: The team discover how the combination of increased leisure time and affordable rail transport brought a new kind of freedom for working-class Victorians. Ruth Goodman travels along the south Devon coast from Paignton to Kingswear, where she helps prepare a paddle steamer for a journey up the River Dart, while at Swanage, Peter Ginn finds out what it was like to work on the excursion trains and the impact mass tourism had on the area

programme.title: Sicily: The Conquered Isle
programme.desc: First of a two-part documentary exploring Sicilys ancient past when it was the breadbasket of the ancient and then medieval world and as such, occupied by Greeks, Romans, Carthaginians, Arabs and Normans

programme.title: Sicily: The Conquered Isle
programme.desc: Part two of two. The islands role on the frontlines of a clash of civilisations during the Spanish era, when its glorious baroque buildings were also created. The programme also explores Sicilys role in the unification of Italy, which led to the coming of the Mafia

programme.title: Edward VIII: Britains Traitor King
programme.desc: Documentary exploring evidence that Edward VIII may have collaborated with the Nazis following his abdication in 1936, as well as the establishment cover-up of his loyalties that occurred following the war. Historians examine the possibility that the former king may have passed information to known spies and been complicit in a plot to reinstate him to the throne in the event of Britain being successfully occupied

programme.title: The War
programme.desc: Hitler takes an enormous gamble as Nazi forces fight the war on two fronts, braving the worst winter in memory to tackle the Allies to the west in the Ardenne Forest of Belgium and Luxemburg as the Russian army gets closer to Berlin. In the Philippines thousands of prisoners starve while they await liberation at the Japanese Santo Tomas internment camp in Manila

programme.title: The War
programme.desc: The violence in the Pacific in early 1945, when Japanese soldiers were ordered to kill as many Americans as possible before their own deaths. Meanwhile, in Europe two armies headed for Berlin as hundreds of thousands of allied troops raced from the west, hoping to reach the German capital before Russias Red Army advanced from the east

programme.title: The War
programme.desc: The Allies discover the horrors of the Nazi concentration camps at Buchenwald, Dachau and Mauthausen-Gusen as they close in on Berlin, while Hitler realises the scale of his defeat and kills himself ahead of Germanys surrender. In the Pacific, kamikaze pilots wreak havoc on the US fleet sailing toward Japan as American forces battle to take the island of Okinawa

programme.title: The War
programme.sub-title: A World Without War - May to December 1945
programme.desc: The final stages of the Second World War in the Far East as the Japanese rulers refused to concede defeat despite the agony of their people, culminating in the dropping of the atomic bombs on Hiroshima and Nagasaki. With the conflict finally at an end, hundreds of thousands of servicemen were able to return home - where they had to learn to live without the structures of military life

programme.title: Edward VIII: Britains Traitor King
programme.desc: Documentary exploring evidence that Edward VIII may have collaborated with the Nazis following his abdication in 1936, as well as the establishment cover-up of his loyalties that occurred following the war. Historians examine the possibility that the former king may have passed information to known spies and been complicit in a plot to reinstate him to the throne in the event of Britain being successfully occupied

programme.title: Inside Japans War

programme.title: Inside Japans War

programme.title: Inside Japans War
programme.desc: Examining the experiences of those in the occupied territories, the various puppet governments and attempts at guerrilla warfare, along with treatment of the PoWs

programme.title: The Zoo
programme.desc: Behind the scenes at Dublin Zoo with the animals who live there and the keepers dedicated to looking after them. Six-month-old gorilla Asali is keeping mother Kafi and the rest of the troop on their toes, while first-time father Bangui gets a little parental training. Taishi the snow leopards health is giving the animal care team cause for concern, and the Asian elephants cool off in their pool on a hot summer day

programme.title: RTÉ News: One OClock and Weather
Home of the Year
programme.desc: Judges Hugh Wallace, Amanda Bone and Siobhán Lam examine Robert and Graces refined extension in Dublin, which gave them additional space and an even larger back garden. Theres also Paul and Joesphines Victorian manse in Donegal, which they spent over three years restoring to its former glory, as well as Vivienne and Endas modern dormer self-build in Kilkenny

programme.title: The Hardacres
programme.desc: Sam is hopeful his latest venture on the docks will not only help his old friends, but also give Joe some much-needed purpose, making him a manager, along with old pal Fred. The Hardacres mask their nerves as Harry sets off to a prestigious boarding school, but Mary quickly finds distraction in a surprising proposition from Lady Emma and Adella

programme.title: Irelands Wild Islands
programme.desc: Eoin Warner visits Co Kerrys Maharees Islands, where Arctic terns return every summer to raise their chicks, before witnessing the many grey seals on the beach of Great Blasket Island. He heads to Skellig Michael, where the monastery is home to a secretive bird that comes every year from Antarctic waters to raise its chicks in the monks ancient cells

programme.title: Emma (1996)
programme.desc: A privileged, headstrong young woman, who believes she is an expert in matters of the heart, sets about matchmaking between her friends - little realising she is falling in love herself and risks missing out on a chance of happiness. Period drama adapted from Jane Austens novel, starring Gwyneth Paltrow, Ewan McGregor, Jeremy Northam, Toni Collette, Greta Scacchi and Juliet Stevenson

programme.desc: The latest national and international headlines

programme.title: Cheap European Homes
programme.desc: Retired cardiac nurse and psychotherapist Nuala, from Wexford, is embracing the next chapter of her life by searching for a home near the Canal du Midi in Beziers in France. She has spent most of her years travelling through France in her camper van and now hopes to establish a permanent base where her family, especially her grandchildren, can share in her love of French culture

programme.title: The Money List
programme.desc: Shane from Galway and Rachel from Offaly take on Karen from Donegal and Conor from Dublin. The winners will go on to face new challengers Ruben from Limerick and Laura from Kildare. Hosted by Baz Ashmawy

programme.title: Fair City
programme.desc: Mondo fears for his future as the jury reach a verdict, Hayley hopes to finally get justice for her father, and Paul and Nicola reconcile, but an unexpected turn of events brings Pauls world crashing down

programme.title: RTÉ News: Nine OClock and Weather
programme.desc: The latest national and international news

programme.title: The Great House Revival
programme.desc: Jill Leavy trades her Dublin home hunt for a bold renovation, transforming her dads abandoned 1932 primary school in Coralstown into her first home

programme.title: Leonard and Hungry Paul
programme.desc: During his shift as a casual postman, Hungry Paul delivers a letter to himself with good news. Leonard asks Shelley to lunch and they spend an hour together, which feels like the start of something. With a proper date planned with her for that evening, Leonard cancels his usual game night with Hungry Paul. Discombobulated, Hungry Paul goes to visit Mrs Hawthorn, but realises the chocolates bought for the hospital nurses have exceeded their sell-by date. Incensed he brings them to the local shop and demands recompense. Comedy, narrated by Julia Roberts and starring Alex Lawther and Laurie Kynaston

programme.title: The Gone
programme.desc: When journalist Aileen Ryan goes missing, Irish detective Theo Richter and Kiwi detective Diana Huia are compelled to remain in the small town of Mt Affinity in New Zealand and lead the search. After discovering Aileen went missing while chasing a lead on the towns historical Mountain Murders, the detectives enter a game of cat and mouse with the Goatman. Thriller, starring Richard Flood

programme.title: Rebus
programme.desc: The wife of prominent charity campaigner Gregor Jack is murdered, and Rebus wonders whether her husband committed the crime - especially as he was recently spotted patronising a brothel. Jacks PA and publicist seem to have secrets to hide, but when evidence linking the victim to a convicted sex offender also comes to light, the detective must figure out which of his suspects is really responsible. Ken Stott stars

programme.title: Lucan
programme.desc: Having acquired the medical notes of Lucans plastic surgeon from more than 50 years earlier, Neil Berriman starts his own analyses. He finds a tiny nick in the nostril that may be a crucial key to identifying Lucan, and maps out ways in which the fugitive lord might have continued to use plastic surgery to alter his facial features. Eventually Neil meets the man he believes killed his mother

Six-month-old gorilla Asali is keeping mother Kafi and the rest of the troop on their toes, while first-time father Bangui gets a little parental training. Taishi the snow leopards health is giving the animal care team cause for concern, and the Asian elephants cool off in their pool on a hot summer day

programme.title: RTÉ News: One OClock and Weather
Home of the Year
programme.desc: Judges Hugh Wallace, Amanda Bone and Siobhán Lam examine Robert and Graces refined extension in Dublin, which gave them additional space and an even larger back garden. Theres also Paul and Joesphines Victorian manse in Donegal, which they spent over three years restoring to its former glory, as well as Vivienne and Endas modern dormer self-build in Kilkenny

programme.title: The Hardacres
programme.desc: Sam is hopeful his latest venture on the docks will not only help his old friends, but also give Joe some much-needed purpose, making him a manager, along with old pal Fred. The Hardacres mask their nerves as Harry sets off to a prestigious boarding school, but Mary quickly finds distraction in a surprising proposition from Lady Emma and Adella

programme.title: Irelands Wild Islands
programme.desc: Eoin Warner visits Co Kerrys Maharees Islands, where Arctic terns return every summer to raise their chicks, before witnessing the many grey seals on the beach of Great Blasket Island. He heads to Skellig Michael, where the monastery is home to a secretive bird that comes every year from Antarctic waters to raise its chicks in the monks ancient cells

programme.title: Emma (1996)
programme.desc: A privileged, headstrong young woman, who believes she is an expert in matters of the heart, sets about matchmaking between her friends - little realising she is falling in love herself and risks missing out on a chance of happiness. Period drama adapted from Jane Austens novel, starring Gwyneth Paltrow, Ewan McGregor, Jeremy Northam, Toni Collette, Greta Scacchi and Juliet Stevenson

programme.title: Nuacht
programme.desc: The latest news headlines

programme.title: RTÉ News
programme.desc: National and international news.

programme.title: The Angelus
programme.desc: Artist Aideen Connolly attempts to capture the beauty and peace of Ballindoon Abbey, a ruin on the Sligo/Leitrim border that is treasured by locals

programme.title: RTÉ News: Six One and Weather
programme.desc: The latest national and international headlines

programme.title: Cheap European Homes
programme.desc: Retired cardiac nurse and psychotherapist Nuala, from Wexford, is embracing the next chapter of her life by searching for a home near the Canal du Midi in Beziers in France. She has spent most of her years travelling through France in her camper van and now hopes to establish a permanent base where her family, especially her grandchildren, can share in her love of French culture

programme.title: The Money List
programme.desc: Shane from Galway and Rachel from Offaly take on Karen from Donegal and Conor from Dublin. The winners will go on to face new challengers Ruben from Limerick and Laura from Kildare. Hosted by Baz Ashmawy

programme.title: Fair City
programme.desc: Mondo fears for his future as the jury reach a verdict, Hayley hopes to finally get justice for her father, and Paul and Nicola reconcile, but an unexpected turn of events brings Pauls world crashing down

programme.title: RTÉ News: Nine OClock and Weather
programme.desc: The latest national and international news

programme.title: The Great House Revival
programme.desc: Jill Leavy trades her Dublin home hunt for a bold renovation, transforming her dads abandoned 1932 primary school in Coralstown into her first home

programme.title: Leonard and Hungry Paul
programme.desc: During his shift as a casual postman, Hungry Paul delivers a letter to himself with good news. Leonard asks Shelley to lunch and they spend an hour together, which feels like the start of something. With a proper date planned with her for that evening, Leonard cancels his usual game night with Hungry Paul. Discombobulated, Hungry Paul goes to visit Mrs Hawthorn, but realises the chocolates bought for the hospital nurses have exceeded their sell-by date. Incensed he brings them to the local shop and demands recompense. Comedy, narrated by Julia Roberts and starring Alex Lawther and Laurie Kynaston

programme.title: The Tommy Tiernan Show
programme.desc: Chat show in which neither the presenter nor the viewers are told the identity of the guests in advance. With the comedian in the dark about who he will be interviewing until they walk out to greet him, anything can happen - especially if Tommy doesnt have a clue who they are

programme.title: Mrs Robinson
programme.desc: Former president of Ireland Mary Robinson tells her story, illuminating battles for justice and equality of over half a century - on the streets, in the courts, at the ballot box, and in backroom corridors of power. This documentary follows her journey from reforming constitutional lawyer and Senator to becoming a crusading UN High Commissioner

programme.title: Rebus
programme.desc: The wife of prominent charity campaigner Gregor Jack is murdered, and Rebus wonders whether her husband committed the crime - especially as he was recently spotted patronising a brothel. Jacks PA and publicist seem to have secrets to hide, but when evidence linking the victim to a convicted sex offender also comes to light, the detective must figure out which of his suspects is really responsible. Ken Stott stars

programme.title: Lucan
programme.desc: Having acquired the medical notes of Lucans plastic surgeon from more than 50 years earlier, Neil Berriman starts his own analyses. He finds a tiny nick in the nostril that may be a crucial key to identifying Lucan, and maps out ways in which the fugitive lord might have continued to use plastic surgery to alter his facial features. Eventually Neil meets the man he believes killed his mother

programme.desc: European and international headlines live via satellite

programme.title: EuroNews
programme.desc: European and international headlines live via satellite

programme.title: Teleshopping
programme.desc: Buying goods from the comfort of home

programme.title: Today
programme.desc: Daily magazine show featuring entertainment and celebrity news, consumer advice, and Irelands biggest giveaways. Presented by Dáithí Ó Se and Maura Derrane

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drew is joined by Leslie Jones and Kate McKinnon

programme.title: The Drew Barrymore Show
programme.desc: Drews News with Ross and his Gossy Posse dishing on the latest Gen Z trends

programme.title: Nightsleeper
programme.desc: After realising that one of the passengers might be armed and operating in league with the hackers, Joe desperately tries to work out who he can trust, while Abby decides to turn the tables on the driver by making a last-minute decision to take the train off the mainline. As Joe closes in on the enemy within and Abby manages to catch the sleeper in her trap, will the police be able to get there in time?

programme.title: Godfather of Harlem
programme.desc: Bumpy fights a white developer for his clubs property when is it threatened with being sold to a white developer. Mayme and Elise stage a protest at Margarets school. Crime drama, starring Forest Whitaker

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Cash is shut out, Jo picks a side, and Harper lashes out

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Sonny and Remi lock horns, David has a new lead, and Jo supports Tane

programme.title: Home and Away
programme.desc: Remi and Sonny go head-to-head, and Holden wont take no for an answer

programme.title: The Royal Bake Off (2023)
programme.desc: A prince arrives in town to find the perfect cake for his brothers coronation but the women who hold the recipe he wants - cousins and rival bakers Allie and Marily - refuse to work together. His only option is to announce a competition between the pair - but it soon becomes clear Marily will do anything to win. Romance, starring Ansley Gordon, Christian Howard and Hannah Brantley

programme.title: The Great Celebrity Bake Off for Stand Up to Cancer
programme.desc: The charity version of the popular baking show, and with Noel Fielding on paternity leave, Matt Lucas presents on his own. Those taking part are Star Wars actress Daisy Ridley, singer Alexandra Burke and comedians Tom Allen and Rob Beckett. To impress Paul Hollywood and Prue Leith, the celebrities serve up millionaire shortbread, a fruity tart and their pet hates in cake form in the showstopper

programme.title: Bridge of Lies
programme.desc: Quiz show hosted by Ross Kemp in which contestants compete for cash by crossing a bridge made up of stepping stones, each of which has a different option. Friends Jacqui, Nigel, Phil and Jane must try to get from A to B by stepping on the truths and avoiding the lies in order to cross the studio floor safely, or risk falling off the bridge and out of the game

programme.title: Grand Designs: House of the Year
programme.desc: Kevin McCloud is joined by architect Damion Burrows, design expert Michelle Ogundehin and conservation architect Natasha Huq to review the properties in the running for the 2022 Royal Institute of British Architects House of the Year award. They begin with five hard-to-build houses, from a playful pink beach house built to withstand fierce winds to a meticulous renovation of a 1960s home in Derbyshire and a DIY eco-home in Stirlingshire. They also visit a difficult-to-build reimagining of a redbrick house in Dorset and a London new-build that faced challenge after challenge

programme.title: UCL Magazine Show
programme.desc: Including reviews of recent Champions League matches, a round-up of the latest news, plus interviews with leading players and coaches

programme.title: Amazing Hotels: Life Beyond the Lobby
programme.desc: Rob Rinder and Monica Galetti work at Stanglwirt Hotel in the Austrian Alps, owned by one family for 300 years. The business, which offers world-class boxing and tennis facilities, and a stable of elegant Lipizzan horses, is all woven around a working Alpine farm with some of the purest water in the world

programme.title: Saving Lives at Sea
programme.desc: A Swanage crew race to the rescue of a diver whose life hangs in the balance off the Dorset coast, while at Kinghorn in Fife a swimmer is swept out to sea and is at severe risk of hypothermia. On Holywell Bay beach near Newquay, a multi-agency operation kicks into gear when a walker suffers a serious injury

programme.title: Hitler Youth
programme.desc: Part two of two. A look at the expansion of the organisation in the build-up to war, and the efforts of the Allies to counter the indoctrination of captured Nazi soldiers

programme.title: Anthropoid (2016)
programme.desc: Second World War drama based on the true story of Operation Anthropoid, the mission to assassinate SS general Reinhard Heydrich, the main architect behind the Final Solution and the Reichs third in command after Hitler and Himmler. Starring Jamie Dornan and Cillian Murphy

programme.title: The Responder
programme.desc: Chris is trying to get better and go straight, but when Barnes tricks him into doing a dodgy car stop, he is drawn into a drug war between two of Liverpools top dealers. Drama, starring Martin Freeman and Bernard Hill

programme.title: The Traitors
programme.desc: The ultimate reality game of detection, backstabbing and trust suddenly becomes very real as the Faithful discover who the Traitors first murder victim is. With suspicions rising, the players must work together in their second mission to continue building money for the prize pot. As night starts to fall, attention turns back to who the Traitors could be, as they must head to the Round Table for the first dramatic banishment. Claudia Winkleman presides as it becomes apparent whether the Faithful will get their revenge and catch a Traitor on their first attempt - or unwittingly sacrifice one of their own

programme.title: The Next Step
programme.desc: As Adele says goodbye she tries to mend fences with Olive, while things get complicated between Heath and Pascale as Anthony deals with Adele leaving

programme.desc: Levis protective over Abigail, Leah gives Holden a serve, and Lacey might be in danger

programme.desc: A teacher fallen on hard times becomes an au pair to an infamous New York property tycoon, and struggles to win over her new employer and his children. Romantic drama, starring Kalinka Petrie and Jefferson Brown

programme.title: Live RTÉ Racing
programme.desc: Coverage of todays racing, which is headlined by the WillowWarm Gold Cup. Other races include the Novice Mares and the Irish Stallion Farms EBF Honeysuckle Mares Novice Hurdle

programme.title: The Simpsons
programme.desc: An insurance payout sends the Simpsons on a trip to Denmark, where they hope to get free healthcare for Grampa, who needs a serious operation

programme.title: Hurricanes From Above
programme.desc: They are the deadliest storms on Earth and climate change is making hurricanes even more intense. This documentary examines the 2024 Atlantic hurricane season, one of the worst on record

programme.title: Gentle Mountains, Wild Marshes - The Alpine Foothills
programme.desc: A look at wildlife living on the slopes at the base of the Alps, one of the most species-rich regions in Europe, featuring deer, owls, woodpeckers, jays and squirrels

programme.title: Kingdom
programme.desc: Documentary about four rival families - leopards, hyenas, wild dogs and lions - trying to claim a rich corner of Zambia as their home. Leopard mother Olimbas world is turned upside down by the arrival of Wild Dog Storm and her chaotic pack. But just when the dogs are beginning to settle into the Kingdom and welcome a litter of puppies, an even more powerful force appears on the horizon - lions. Narrated by David Attenborough

programme.title: Father Ted
programme.desc: Father Jack is hauled off to the local old priests home to be treated for a strange medical complaint. He is replaced by a younger man - who proceeds to drive everyone crazy by playing jungle music at ear-splitting volume for hours on end. Dermot Morgan and Frank Kelly star

programme.title: Reiteoir!
programme.desc: Sports broadcaster Gráinne McElwain explores the extent and impact of abuse faced by GAA football referees. With contributions from referees David Gough, Siobhán Coyle and Eoghan Ó Muircheartaigh, and insights from GAA president Jarlath Burns and others, the programme examines a growing crisis in the association and asks what can be done to combat it. programme.desc: A young, discontented single mother must choose between her troubled son or the freedom she desperately craves after a chance encounter presents an opportunity for escape

Two devoted scarecrows, Betty OBarley and Harry OHay, plan a wedding to remember but, when Harry insists on leaving the farm to collect one last thing for their big day, a smooth-talking scarecrow named Reginald Rake swoops in with plans of his own.
